Health & Injury Assessment

Help us create a safe, effective program

High stress = cortisol = harder fat loss
Critical for men 35+
Irregular/absent = too much stress or undereating

Training History & Performance

Your training background helps us optimize programming

Rough guideline: Intermediate men = 1.5x BW squat, 1x BW bench, 2x BW deadlift

Nutrition History & Metabolic Status

Understanding your diet history prevents mistakes

If "damaged" - we'll recommend reverse diet first, not fat loss
If disordered - we'll recommend working with specialist

Lifestyle & Daily Activity

Your lifestyle affects your nutrition needs

Alcohol affects recovery, hormones, and fat loss

Your Specific Goals

What matters most to you?

Optional but helps with urgency/pacing
Honesty helps us build sustainability

Let's ensure you're set up for success

☀️ Daily sunlight

Morning light exposure anchors your circadian rhythm — the strongest non-pharmacological lever for sleep, mood, and metabolic health. Aim for 5–10 min within an hour of waking.

⚙️ Your Profile
Re-assess every 2–4 weeks to recalibrate your plan based on progress.
🍳 Breakfast Preferences
Choose your preferred breakfast option. All options scale to your personal macros.
🎯 Macro Tolerance Settings
Set acceptable ranges for your daily macros. Green = within range, Yellow = close, Red = outside range.
±5g (Strict) ±30g (Flexible)
±10g (Strict) ±50g (Flexible)
±5g (Strict) ±25g (Flexible)
±50 cal (Strict) ±300 cal (Flexible)
💡 Tolerances help you understand when you're close enough to your targets without being too strict.
📖 Quick Guide

Meal Timing: Eat within your recommended windows for optimal metabolism and recovery.

Hydration: Front-load water early in the day. Taper after 7pm for better sleep.

Training: Progressive overload is key. Increase weight/reps gradually.

Sleep: Non-negotiable 7-9 hours. Room at 65-68°F, complete darkness.

Re-assessment: Check recovery status every 2-4 weeks and adjust accordingly.

`); printWindow.document.close(); } // ======================================== // RECIPE PHOTOS // ======================================== /** * Upload photo for a recipe */ function uploadRecipePhoto(recipeId) { const input = document.createElement('input'); input.type = 'file'; input.accept = 'image/*'; input.onchange = function(e) { const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return; if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Photo must be under 5MB'); else alert('Photo must be under 5MB'); return; } const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(event) { if (!state.recipePhotos) state.recipePhotos = {}; state.recipePhotos[recipeId] = event.target.result; saveState(); // Refresh displays if (typeof renderMealPlanner === 'function') renderMealPlanner(); if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Photo uploaded'); else alert('Photo uploaded'); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); }; input.click(); } /** * Get recipe photo URL */ function getRecipePhoto(recipeId) { return state.recipePhotos?.[recipeId] || null; } /** * Delete recipe photo */ function deleteRecipePhoto(recipeId) { if (state.recipePhotos?.[recipeId]) { delete state.recipePhotos[recipeId]; saveState(); if (typeof renderMealPlanner === 'function') renderMealPlanner(); } } /** * Display recipe photo if available */ function displayRecipePhoto(recipeId, size = '60px') { const photoUrl = getRecipePhoto(recipeId); if (!photoUrl) return ''; return ` `; } /** * View photo in full screen */ function viewRecipePhotoFull(recipeId) { const photoUrl = getRecipePhoto(recipeId); if (!photoUrl) return; const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.style.cssText = ` position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 10000; cursor: pointer; `; modal.innerHTML = ` `; modal.onclick = function() { document.body.removeChild(modal); }; document.body.appendChild(modal); } // ======================================== // ALTERNATIVE INGREDIENTS // ======================================== /** * Ingredient substitution database */ const ingredientSubstitutions = { 'chicken breast': [ { alt: 'turkey breast', reason: 'Similar protein, slightly leaner', macroChange: 'protein: +2g' }, { alt: 'tofu', reason: 'Vegan option, lower calories', macroChange: 'protein: -10g, calories: -50' }, { alt: 'chicken thigh', reason: 'More flavor, higher fat', macroChange: 'fat: +5g' } ], 'ground beef': [ { alt: 'ground turkey', reason: '30% less fat, similar protein', macroChange: 'fat: -8g' }, { alt: 'ground chicken', reason: 'Leaner option', macroChange: 'fat: -10g' }, { alt: 'lentils', reason: 'Vegan, high fiber', macroChange: 'protein: -15g, carbs: +20g, fiber: +8g' } ], 'salmon': [ { alt: 'trout', reason: 'Similar omega-3s, often cheaper', macroChange: 'Similar' }, { alt: 'mackerel', reason: 'Higher omega-3s, budget-friendly', macroChange: 'fat: +3g' }, { alt: 'cod', reason: 'Leaner option', macroChange: 'fat: -5g' } ], 'rice': [ { alt: 'quinoa', reason: 'Higher protein, complete amino acids', macroChange: 'protein: +5g' }, { alt: 'cauliflower rice', reason: 'Low-carb option', macroChange: 'carbs: -35g, calories: -150' }, { alt: 'pasta', reason: 'Similar carbs, different texture', macroChange: 'Similar' } ], 'pasta': [ { alt: 'zucchini noodles', reason: 'Low-carb, vegetable-based', macroChange: 'carbs: -40g, calories: -180' }, { alt: 'whole wheat pasta', reason: 'Higher fiber', macroChange: 'fiber: +5g' }, { alt: 'rice noodles', reason: 'Gluten-free option', macroChange: 'Similar' } ], 'butter': [ { alt: 'olive oil', reason: 'Heart-healthy fats', macroChange: 'saturated fat: -5g' }, { alt: 'avocado oil', reason: 'High smoke point, neutral flavor', macroChange: 'Similar' }, { alt: 'ghee', reason: 'Lactose-free, high smoke point', macroChange: 'Similar' } ], 'milk': [ { alt: 'almond milk', reason: 'Low-calorie, dairy-free', macroChange: 'calories: -100, protein: -6g' }, { alt: 'oat milk', reason: 'Creamy texture, dairy-free', macroChange: 'carbs: +5g' }, { alt: 'soy milk', reason: 'High protein, dairy-free', macroChange: 'Similar protein' } ], 'eggs': [ { alt: 'egg whites', reason: 'No fat, pure protein', macroChange: 'fat: -5g, cholesterol: -185mg' }, { alt: 'flax eggs', reason: 'Vegan option (1 tbsp ground flax + 3 tbsp water)', macroChange: 'binding only' }, { alt: 'silken tofu', reason: 'Vegan, for baking', macroChange: 'protein: similar' } ] }; /** * Get substitutions for an ingredient */ function getIngredientSubstitutions(ingredient) { const ingredientLower = ingredient.toLowerCase(); // Check for exact matches first for (const [key, subs] of Object.entries(ingredientSubstitutions)) { if (ingredientLower.includes(key)) { return { ingredient: key, substitutions: subs }; } } return null; } /** * Find all substitutable ingredients in a recipe */ function findSubstitutableIngredients(recipeId, recipeType = 'dinner') { let recipe; if (recipeType === 'breakfast') { recipe = breakfastOptions[recipeId]; } else if (recipeType === 'lunch') { recipe = lunchRecipes[recipeId]; } else { recipe = recipes[recipeId]; } if (!recipe || !recipe.getIngredients) return []; const macros = { protein: 40, carbs: 50, fat: 20 }; const ingredients = recipe.getIngredients(macros); const substitutable = []; ingredients.forEach(ing => { const subs = getIngredientSubstitutions(ing); if (subs) { substitutable.push({ original: ing, options: subs.substitutions }); } }); return substitutable; } /** * Display substitution suggestions for a recipe */ function displaySubstitutionSuggestions(recipeId, recipeType = 'dinner') { const subs = findSubstitutableIngredients(recipeId, recipeType); if (subs.length === 0) { return '
No substitutions available for this recipe
'; } let html = ''; subs.forEach(sub => { html += `
Instead of: ${sub.original}
${sub.options.map(opt => `
✓ ${opt.alt}
${opt.reason}
${opt.macroChange}
`).join('')}
`; }); return html; } // ======================================== // AI MEAL SUGGESTIONS // ======================================== /** * Analyze meal patterns and suggest improvements */ function generateAIMealSuggestions() { const suggestions = []; if (!state.mealHistory || state.mealHistory.length < 7) { return [{ type: 'info', title: 'Start Tracking', message: 'Log your meals for a week to get personalized suggestions', priority: 1 }]; } // Analyze variety const varietySuggestion = analyzeVariety(); if (varietySuggestion) suggestions.push(varietySuggestion); // Analyze rating patterns const ratingSuggestion = analyzeRatingPatterns(); if (ratingSuggestion) suggestions.push(ratingSuggestion); // Analyze cuisine balance const cuisineSuggestion = analyzeCuisineBalance(); if (cuisineSuggestion) suggestions.push(cuisineSuggestion); // Analyze timing patterns const timingSuggestion = analyzeTimingPatterns(); if (timingSuggestion) suggestions.push(timingSuggestion); return suggestions.sort((a, b) => a.priority - b.priority); } /** * Analyze meal variety */ function analyzeVariety() { const recentMeals = state.mealHistory.slice(-21); // Last 3 weeks const uniqueMeals = new Set(recentMeals.map(m => m.mealId)).size; if (uniqueMeals < 10) { return { type: 'variety', title: 'Mix It Up!', message: `You've only tried ${uniqueMeals} different meals recently. Consider rotating in new options for better nutrition variety.`, priority: 2, action: 'Browse recipes by cuisine you haven\'t tried' }; } return null; } /** * Analyze rating patterns */ function analyzeRatingPatterns() { if (!state.recipeRatings) return null; const ratings = Object.entries(state.recipeRatings); if (ratings.length < 5) return null; // Find highly rated meals not in current rotation const highlyRated = ratings.filter(([id, rating]) => rating >= 4); const inRotation = [ ...state.favoriteLunches, ...state.favoriteDinners ]; const notInRotation = highlyRated.filter(([id]) => !inRotation.includes(id)); if (notInRotation.length > 0) { const meal = notInRotation[0]; const mealName = recipes[meal[0]]?.name || lunchRecipes[meal[0]]?.name || 'Unknown'; return { type: 'rating', title: 'You Love This!', message: `You rated "${mealName}" ${meal[1]} stars but it's not in your rotation. Add it to your favorites?`, priority: 1, action: 'Update your favorite meals', mealId: meal[0] }; } return null; } /** * Analyze cuisine balance */ function analyzeCuisineBalance() { const cuisines = {}; [...state.favoriteLunches, ...state.favoriteDinners].forEach(mealId => { const meal = recipes[mealId] || lunchRecipes[mealId]; if (meal && meal.cuisine) { cuisines[meal.cuisine] = (cuisines[meal.cuisine] || 0) + 1; } }); const entries = Object.entries(cuisines); if (entries.length < 3) { return { type: 'cuisine', title: 'Branch Out', message: `You're mostly eating ${entries[0]?.[0] || 'the same'} cuisine. Try adding some variety from different cultures!`, priority: 3, action: 'Explore new cuisines' }; } return null; } /** * Analyze timing patterns */ function analyzeTimingPatterns() { if (!state.mealHistory || state.mealHistory.length < 14) return null; const recentWeek = state.mealHistory.slice(-21); const weekendMeals = recentWeek.filter(m => { const date = new Date(m.date); const day = date.getDay(); return day === 0 || day === 6; // Sunday or Saturday }); if (weekendMeals.length < 4) { return { type: 'timing', title: 'Weekend Prep', message: 'You seem to skip meals on weekends. Use Sunday for meal prep to stay on track!', priority: 4, action: 'View meal prep schedule' }; } return null; } /** * Suggest new meals based on preferences */ function suggestNewMeals() { const suggestions = []; // Find highest rated cuisine const cuisineRatings = {}; Object.entries(state.recipeRatings || {}).forEach(([mealId, rating]) => { const meal = recipes[mealId] || lunchRecipes[mealId]; if (meal && meal.cuisine) { if (!cuisineRatings[meal.cuisine]) { cuisineRatings[meal.cuisine] = { total: 0, count: 0 }; } cuisineRatings[meal.cuisine].total += rating; cuisineRatings[meal.cuisine].count += 1; } }); // Calculate average ratings per cuisine const avgRatings = Object.entries(cuisineRatings).map(([cuisine, data]) => ({ cuisine, avgRating: data.total / data.count })).sort((a, b) => b.avgRating - a.avgRating); if (avgRatings.length > 0) { const topCuisine = avgRatings[0].cuisine; // Find meals from top cuisine not yet tried const allMeals = { ...recipes, ...lunchRecipes }; const untried = Object.entries(allMeals) .filter(([id, meal]) => meal.cuisine === topCuisine && !state.recipeRatings?.[id] && !state.favoriteDinners.includes(id) && !state.favoriteLunches.includes(id) ) .slice(0, 3); untried.forEach(([id, meal]) => { suggestions.push({ type: 'new', mealId: id, name: meal.name, cuisine: meal.cuisine, reason: `You love ${topCuisine} food! This might be a hit.`, priority: 2 }); }); } return suggestions; } // ======================================== // GROCERY DELIVERY INTEGRATION // ======================================== /** * Grocery delivery providers */ const deliveryProviders = { instacart: { name: 'Instacart', baseUrl: 'https://www.instacart.com', supported: true }, amazon: { name: 'Amazon Fresh', baseUrl: 'https://www.amazon.com/alm/storefront', supported: true }, walmart: { name: 'Walmart+', baseUrl: 'https://www.walmart.com/grocery', supported: true } }; /** * Generate shopping list URL for delivery service */ function generateDeliveryLink(provider = 'instacart') { const shoppingData = calculateWeeklyIngredients(); if (!shoppingData.ingredientsNeeded) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Generate your shopping list first'); else alert('Generate shopping list first'); return null; } const items = Object.values(shoppingData.ingredientsNeeded); if (provider === 'instacart') { // Instacart deep link format const searchTerms = items.map(item => encodeURIComponent(item.name)).join(','); return `https://www.instacart.com/store/search?products=${searchTerms}`; } else if (provider === 'amazon') { // Amazon Fresh search const searchQuery = items.map(item => item.name).join(' '); return `https://www.amazon.com/s?k=${encodeURIComponent(searchQuery)}&i=amazonfresh`; } else if (provider === 'walmart') { // Walmart Grocery return `https://www.walmart.com/grocery/search/?query=${encodeURIComponent(items[0]?.name || 'groceries')}`; } return null; } /** * Open delivery service with shopping list */ function orderGroceries(provider = 'instacart') { const link = generateDeliveryLink(provider); if (link) { window.open(link, '_blank'); alert(`✅ Opening ${deliveryProviders[provider].name}!\n\nYour shopping list items will be searched.`); } else { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Could not generate delivery link'); else alert('Could not generate delivery link'); } } /** * Display delivery options */ function displayDeliveryOptions() { return `
${Object.entries(deliveryProviders).map(([key, provider]) => ` `).join('')}
💡 Tip: Links open the delivery service with your ingredients pre-searched. You'll need to add them to your cart manually.
`; } // ======================================== // FAMILY MODE // ======================================== /** * Create a new family member profile */ function createFamilyProfile(name) { if (!state.familyProfiles) state.familyProfiles = {}; const profileId = 'profile_' + Date.now(); state.familyProfiles[profileId] = { id: profileId, name: name, createdAt: Date.now(), profile: null, // Will store their profile data state: { // Their personal state favoriteLunches: [], favoriteDinners: [], recipeRatings: {}, mealHistory: [] } }; saveState(); return profileId; } /** * Switch to a family member's profile */ function switchToProfile(profileId) { if (profileId === 'default') { state.activeProfile = 'default'; saveState(); location.reload(); return; } if (!state.familyProfiles?.[profileId]) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Profile not found'); else alert('Profile not found'); return; } // Save current state saveCurrentProfileState(); // Switch to new profile state.activeProfile = profileId; // Load their state const familyMember = state.familyProfiles[profileId]; if (familyMember.state) { Object.assign(state, familyMember.state); } if (familyMember.profile) { profile = familyMember.profile; } saveState(); location.reload(); } /** * Save current profile's state */ function saveCurrentProfileState() { if (state.activeProfile === 'default') { // Default profile uses main state return; } if (!state.familyProfiles?.[state.activeProfile]) return; // Save personal data state.familyProfiles[state.activeProfile].state = { favoriteLunches: state.favoriteLunches, favoriteDinners: state.favoriteDinners, defaultBreakfast: state.defaultBreakfast, favoriteSnacks: state.favoriteSnacks, recipeRatings: state.recipeRatings, recipeNotes: state.recipeNotes, mealHistory: state.mealHistory, weeklyMealPlan: state.weeklyMealPlan }; state.familyProfiles[state.activeProfile].profile = profile; } /** * Get list of family members */ function getFamilyMembers() { const members = [ { id: 'default', name: 'You', active: state.activeProfile === 'default' } ]; if (state.familyProfiles) { Object.values(state.familyProfiles).forEach(fm => { members.push({ id: fm.id, name: fm.name, active: state.activeProfile === fm.id }); }); } return members; } /** * Display family profile switcher */ function displayFamilyProfileSwitcher() { const members = getFamilyMembers(); let html = `
Family Members
`; members.forEach(member => { html += `
${member.name} ${member.active ? '✓ Active' : 'Switch'}
`; }); html += `
`; return html; } /** * Add new family member */ function addNewFamilyMember() { const name = prompt('Enter family member name:'); if (!name) return; const profileId = createFamilyProfile(name); alert(`✅ ${name}'s profile created! Switch to their profile to set up their preferences.`); // Refresh display if (typeof renderFamilySection === 'function') { renderFamilySection(); } } /** * Generate household shopping list (all family members combined) */ function generateHouseholdShoppingList() { const householdIngredients = {}; // Add default profile ingredients const defaultData = calculateWeeklyIngredients(); Object.entries(defaultData.ingredientsNeeded || {}).forEach(([key, data]) => { householdIngredients[key] = { ...data }; }); // Add each family member's ingredients if (state.familyProfiles) { Object.values(state.familyProfiles).forEach(member => { if (member.state?.favoriteLunches?.length > 0) { // Calculate their ingredients (simplified) // In real implementation, would need to load their full state console.log(`Adding ingredients for ${member.name}`); } }); } return householdIngredients; } function renderBudgetSuggestions(suggestions) { if (suggestions.length === 0) { document.getElementById('budget-suggestions').style.display = 'none'; return; } let html = `
⚠️ Budget Optimization Suggestions
Try these strategies in order to get under budget:
`; // Group by priority const priority1 = suggestions.filter(s => s.priority === 1); const priority2 = suggestions.filter(s => s.priority === 2); const priority3 = suggestions.filter(s => s.priority === 3); // Priority 1: Meal Swaps if (priority1.length > 0) { const totalSwapSavings = priority1.reduce((sum, s) => sum + parseFloat(s.savings), 0); html += `
✅ Priority 1: Swap to Budget-Friendly Meals
Save $${totalSwapSavings.toFixed(2)}/week by choosing these budget alternatives:
`; priority1.forEach(swap => { html += `
Day ${swap.day}: ${swap.current} ($${swap.currentCost}) → ${swap.alternative} ($${swap.alternativeCost})
💰 Save $${swap.savings}
`; }); html += `
`; } // Priority 2: Reduce Meals if (priority2.length > 0) { const suggestion = priority2[0]; html += `
${suggestion.icon} Priority 2: ${suggestion.message}
${suggestion.explanation}
💰 Save $${suggestion.savings}/week (~18%)
${suggestion.action}
`; } // Priority 3: Eliminate Snacks if (priority3.length > 0) { const suggestion = priority3[0]; html += `
${suggestion.icon} Priority 3: ${suggestion.message}
${suggestion.explanation}
💰 Save $${suggestion.savings}/week
${suggestion.action}
`; } html += `
💡 Tip: Start with Priority 1 swaps. If still over budget, consider Priority 2, then 3.
`; document.getElementById('budget-suggestions').innerHTML = html; document.getElementById('budget-suggestions').style.display = 'block'; } /** * NEW: Render budget optimization panel using new suggestion system */ function renderBudgetOptimizationPanel() { const suggestions = state.budgetOptimizationSuggestions || []; if (suggestions.length === 0) { document.getElementById('budget-suggestions').style.display = 'none'; return; } let html = `
💡 Budget Optimization Suggestions
Try these strategies in order to get under budget:
`; suggestions.forEach((suggestion, index) => { const priorityNum = index + 1; const borderColors = ['#0a7d5a', '#d97706', '#dc2626', '#6c757d']; const borderColor = borderColors[Math.min(index, 3)]; html += `
${priorityNum}. ${suggestion.title}
${suggestion.description}
-$${suggestion.savings?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'}
per week
${suggestion.options ? `
` : ''}
`; }); html += `
💡 Tip: Apply suggestions in order. Each change recalculates your budget automatically.
`; document.getElementById('swap-suggestions').innerHTML = html; document.getElementById('budget-suggestions').style.display = 'block'; } /** * Apply a budget optimization suggestion */ function applySuggestion(index) { const suggestion = state.budgetOptimizationSuggestions[index]; if (!suggestion) return; console.log('Applying suggestion:', suggestion); // Handle different suggestion types switch (suggestion.type) { case 'ingredient_substitution': alert(`💡 When shopping: ${suggestion.description}\n\nThis will save you $${suggestion.savings.toFixed(2)}/week!`); break; case 'cheaper_snack': state.selectedEveningSnack = suggestion.snackId; alert(`✅ Snack changed to ${eveningOptions[suggestion.snackId]?.name}\n\nSaving $${suggestion.savings.toFixed(2)}/week!`); break; case 'eliminate_snack': state.includeSnack = false; alert(`✅ Evening snack removed\n\nSaving $${suggestion.savings.toFixed(2)}/week!`); break; case 'meal_swap_within_ethnicity': case 'meal_swap_any_ethnicity': if (suggestion.mealType === 'lunch') { const lunchIndex = state.favoriteLunches.indexOf(suggestion.originalId); if (lunchIndex !== -1) { state.favoriteLunches[lunchIndex] = suggestion.suggestedId; const newMeal = lunchRecipes[suggestion.suggestedId]; alert(`✅ Lunch swapped to ${newMeal?.name}\n\nSaving $${suggestion.savings.toFixed(2)}/week!`); } } else { const dinnerIndex = state.favoriteDinners.indexOf(suggestion.originalId); if (dinnerIndex !== -1) { state.favoriteDinners[dinnerIndex] = suggestion.suggestedId; const newMeal = recipes[suggestion.suggestedId]; alert(`✅ Dinner swapped to ${newMeal?.name}\n\nSaving $${suggestion.savings.toFixed(2)}/week!`); } } break; case 'reduce_meals': const selectedOption = document.getElementById(`suggestion-${index}-option`)?.value; if (selectedOption) { state.mealsPerDay = 2; if (selectedOption === 'lunch_dinner') { // Remove breakfast from rotation for (let day = 1; day <= 7; day++) { state.weeklyMealPlan[`day${day}`].breakfast = null; } } alert(`✅ Reduced to 2 meals per day (${selectedOption.replace('_', ' + ')})\n\nSaving $${suggestion.savings.toFixed(2)}/week!`); } break; } // Recalculate everything calculateMealRotation(); calculateWeeklyBudget(); distributeRemainingMacros(); runBudgetOptimization(); // Update all displays saveState(); renderMealPlanner(); renderBudgetTracker(); renderBudgetOptimizationPanel(); console.log('Suggestion applied, everything recalculated'); } // State for shopping list display let shoppingListState = { groupByStore: false, // false = group by category, true = group by store showPrices: true }; function toggleGroupByStore() { shoppingListState.groupByStore = !shoppingListState.groupByStore; // Button label shows the action you'll take next (inverse of current mode), // matching standard toggle UX. Tapping it switches to the named mode. document.getElementById('group-toggle-text').textContent = shoppingListState.groupByStore ? '📋 Group by Category' : '📦 Group by Store'; renderDynamicShopping(); } function toggleShowPrices() { shoppingListState.showPrices = !shoppingListState.showPrices; document.getElementById('price-toggle-text').textContent = shoppingListState.showPrices ? '💰 Hide Prices' : '💰 Show Prices'; renderDynamicShopping(); } // Store name mapping with emojis and colors const storeInfo = { aldi: { name: 'Aldi', emoji: '🥇', color: '#e76f51', description: 'Best for proteins & produce' }, walmart: { name: 'Walmart', emoji: '🥈', color: '#0891b2', description: 'Best for grains & pantry' }, costco: { name: 'Costco', emoji: '🥉', color: '#95E1D3', description: 'Best for bulk items' }, specialty: { name: 'Specialty Store', emoji: '🌟', color: '#a78bfa', description: 'Whole Foods, Trader Joe\'s, etc.' } }; function renderDynamicShopping() { if (!profile) return; // Always regenerate from current plan (don't use stale cached data) const shoppingData = generateShoppingList(); state.dynamicShoppingList = shoppingData; if (typeof saveState === 'function') saveState(); // v1.4.2: ensure pantry state exists if (!state.shoppingPantry) state.shoppingPantry = {}; const pantry = state.shoppingPantry; if (shoppingData.mealsSelected === 0) { document.getElementById('unified-shopping-list').innerHTML = `
📋

No meals planned yet

Go to the Plan tab to select your weekly dinners.

`; document.getElementById('total-selected-cost').textContent = '$0.00'; document.getElementById('total-selected-items').textContent = '0'; document.getElementById('shopping-badge').textContent = '0/0'; const pb = document.getElementById('shopping-pantry-banner'); if (pb) pb.style.display = 'none'; return; } // v1.4.2: Subtract pantry items from displayed cost. Pantry items still // appear in the list (struck through, faded) so the user knows what they // already have on hand — they just don't count toward this week's spend. const totalCostNum = typeof shoppingData.totalCost === 'number' ? shoppingData.totalCost : parseFloat(shoppingData.totalCost) || 0; const pantryItems = (shoppingData.items || []).filter(it => pantry[it.dbKey]); const pantrySavings = pantryItems.reduce((sum, it) => sum + (parseFloat(it.cost) || 0), 0); const adjustedTotal = Math.max(0, totalCostNum - pantrySavings); document.getElementById('total-selected-cost').textContent = `$${adjustedTotal.toFixed(2)}`; document.getElementById('total-selected-items').textContent = (shoppingData.items.length - pantryItems.length); // Populate pantry banner const pantryBanner = document.getElementById('shopping-pantry-banner'); if (pantryBanner) { if (pantryItems.length > 0) { pantryBanner.style.display = 'flex'; pantryBanner.innerHTML = `
🧺 ${pantryItems.length} item${pantryItems.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} on hand · saving $${pantrySavings.toFixed(2)} this week
`; } else { pantryBanner.style.display = 'none'; } } // Also sync profile.weeklyBudget so home/plan displays match if (profile && typeof profile.weeklyBudget !== 'undefined') { profile.weeklyBudget = adjustedTotal; try { localStorage.setItem('user-profile', JSON.stringify(profile)); } catch (e) {} } // Update badge const dayData = getDayData('shopping'); const checkedCount = Object.values(dayData).filter(v => v).length; document.getElementById('shopping-badge').textContent = `${checkedCount}/${shoppingData.items.length}`; // Render store recommendations renderStoreRecommendations(); // Render unified shopping list let html = ''; if (shoppingListState.groupByStore) { html = renderShoppingListByStore(shoppingData, dayData); } else { html = renderShoppingListByCategory(shoppingData, dayData); } document.getElementById('unified-shopping-list').innerHTML = html; } function renderShoppingListByCategory(shoppingData, dayData) { // Group items by category const groupedByCategory = {}; shoppingData.items.forEach(item => { const category = item.category || 'other'; if (!groupedByCategory[category]) { groupedByCategory[category] = []; } groupedByCategory[category].push(item); }); const categoryOrder = { protein: { name: '🥩 Proteins', priority: 1 }, produce: { name: '🥬 Produce', priority: 2 }, grain: { name: '🌾 Grains & Breads', priority: 3 }, canned: { name: '🥫 Canned Goods', priority: 4 }, sauce: { name: '🧂 Sauces & Seasonings', priority: 5 }, oil: { name: '🫒 Oils', priority: 6 }, nuts: { name: '🥜 Nuts & Seeds', priority: 7 }, staple: { name: '📦 Staples', priority: 8 }, supplement: { name: '💪 Supplements', priority: 9 } }; const sortedCategories = Object.keys(groupedByCategory).sort((a, b) => { const priorityA = categoryOrder[a]?.priority || 999; const priorityB = categoryOrder[b]?.priority || 999; return priorityA - priorityB; }); let html = ''; sortedCategories.forEach(category => { const categoryName = categoryOrder[category]?.name || category; const items = groupedByCategory[category]; const categoryTotal = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + parseFloat(item.cost), 0); html += `
${categoryName}
${items.length} items • $${categoryTotal.toFixed(2)}
`; items.forEach((item, index) => { const ingredient = ingredientDatabase[item.dbKey]; const checked = dayData[item.dbKey] || false; const checkedClass = checked ? 'checked' : ''; const isPantry = !!(state.shoppingPantry && state.shoppingPantry[item.dbKey]); const bestStore = ingredient?.bestStore || 'walmart'; const store = storeInfo[bestStore] || storeInfo['walmart'] || { name: 'Store', emoji: '🏪', color: '#666' }; // v1.5.1 Issue #7: Show whole-package price as primary (what the user // actually pays at checkout) with the amortized weekly cost as // secondary text. Users were seeing "$2.99" thinking that was the // grocery price, then paying $11.97 for the full container. The // weekly cost is still what feeds the budget total — we just stop // hiding the actual purchase price. const packageCost = ingredient && typeof ingredient.cost === 'number' ? ingredient.cost : 0; const weeklyAmortized = parseFloat(item.cost) || 0; const showAmortizedHint = packageCost > 0 && weeklyAmortized > 0 && Math.abs(packageCost - weeklyAmortized) > 0.01; html += `
`; }); html += `
`; }); return html; } function renderShoppingListByStore(shoppingData, dayData) { // Use the byStore grouping from generateShoppingList if (!shoppingData.byStore || Object.keys(shoppingData.byStore).length === 0) { return '
No items to display
'; } const storeColors = { aldi: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #e76f51 0%, #d65a3f 100%)', walmart: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0891b2 0%, #0e7490 100%)', costco: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #95E1D3 0%, #7FCDBB 100%)', traderjoes: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #FCA5A5 0%, #F87171 100%)', heb: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #fcd34d 0%, #f59e0b 100%)', target: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626 0%, #b91c1c 100%)', sams: 'var(--accent-gradient)', kroger: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #A78BFA 0%, #8B5CF6 100%)', wholefood: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981 0%, #10B981 100%)', amazonfresh: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0891b2 0%, #0e7490 100%)', specialty: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #a78bfa 0%, #8b5cf6 100%)' }; let html = ''; // Render each store's items. // Defensive: skip any malformed entries (e.g., values that aren't proper // {name, emoji, items[], totalCost} objects). This shouldn't happen with // the current grouping logic, but it's a safety net for future regressions. Object.keys(shoppingData.byStore).forEach(storeKey => { const storeData = shoppingData.byStore[storeKey]; if (!storeData || !Array.isArray(storeData.items)) return; const items = storeData.items; if (items.length === 0) return; // Skip empty stores const storeColor = storeColors[storeKey] || 'var(--accent-gradient)'; const storeName = storeData.name || storeKey; const storeEmoji = storeData.emoji || '🏪'; const storeTotal = storeData.totalCost || '0.00'; html += `
${storeEmoji} ${storeName}
Best prices on these items
${items.length} items
$${storeTotal}
`; items.forEach((item, index) => { const checked = dayData[item.dbKey] || false; const checkedClass = checked ? 'checked' : ''; const isPantry = !!(state.shoppingPantry && state.shoppingPantry[item.dbKey]); // v1.5.1 Issue #7: package price primary, amortized weekly cost secondary. const ingredient = ingredientDatabase[item.dbKey]; const packageCost = ingredient && typeof ingredient.cost === 'number' ? ingredient.cost : 0; const weeklyAmortized = parseFloat(item.cost) || 0; const showAmortizedHint = packageCost > 0 && weeklyAmortized > 0 && Math.abs(packageCost - weeklyAmortized) > 0.01; html += `
`; }); html += `
`; }); return html; } function saveCheckin() { const weight = document.getElementById('checkin-weight').value; const waist = document.getElementById('checkin-waist').value; const feeling = document.getElementById('checkin-feeling').value; const notes = document.getElementById('checkin-notes').value; if (!weight) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Enter your weight'); else alert('Please enter your weight'); return; } const checkin = { date: new Date().toISOString(), day: state.currentDay, weight: parseFloat(weight), waist: waist ? parseFloat(waist) : null, feeling: feeling, notes: notes }; state.checkins.push(checkin); saveState(); document.getElementById('checkin-weight').value = ''; document.getElementById('checkin-waist').value = ''; document.getElementById('checkin-notes').value = ''; renderCheckinHistory(); if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Check-in saved — keep it up'); else alert('Check-in saved'); } function renderCheckinHistory() { if (!state.checkins || state.checkins.length === 0) { document.getElementById('checkin-history').innerHTML = `
No check-ins yet. Start tracking your progress!
`; return; } const sorted = [...state.checkins].reverse(); const html = `

Check-In History

${sorted.map(c => { const date = new Date(c.date); return `
${date.toLocaleDateString()} - Day ${c.day}
Weight: ${c.weight} lbs ${c.waist ? ` • Waist: ${c.waist}"` : ''}
Feeling: ${c.feeling} ${c.notes ? `
${c.notes}` : ''}
`; }).join('')} `; document.getElementById('checkin-history').innerHTML = html; } function updateStats() { // Defensive: many of the elements this function used to update lived inside // the deleted Today section. Skip any that no longer exist. // Activity Rings are now driven exclusively by updateMacroSummary() which // reads the diary — single source of truth, fixes the NaN bug. const set = (id, value) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.textContent = value; }; // Hydration badges and progress (Diary tab now) const hydrationData = (typeof getDayData === 'function') ? getDayData('hydration') : {}; const hydrationComplete = Object.values(hydrationData).filter(Boolean).length; const hydrationPercent = Math.round((hydrationComplete / 8) * 100); set('hydration-badge', `${hydrationComplete}/8`); const progressBar = document.getElementById('hydration-progress'); if (progressBar) progressBar.style.width = `${hydrationPercent}%`; if (typeof getHydrationSchedule === 'function') { const schedule = getHydrationSchedule(); const waterToday = schedule.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (hydrationData[item.id] ? item.oz : 0), 0); set('water-today', `${waterToday}oz`); } // Evening checklist (still exists if/when routine tab is shown) const eveningData = (typeof getDayData === 'function') ? getDayData('evening') : {}; const eveningComplete = Object.values(eveningData).filter(Boolean).length; set('evening-badge', `${eveningComplete}/11`); // Shopping (Plan tab) if (typeof shoppingCategories !== 'undefined') { const totalShoppingItems = shoppingCategories.reduce((sum, cat) => sum + cat.items.length, 0); const shoppingComplete = state.shopping ? Object.values(state.shopping).filter(Boolean).length : 0; set('shopping-badge', `${shoppingComplete}/${totalShoppingItems}`); } // Progress tab counters set('days-active', state.currentDay || 0); } function switchTab(tab) { document.querySelectorAll('.nav button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); document.querySelectorAll('.section').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active')); // v1.5.1 Issue #5: Tabs sometimes didn't turn green on first tap because // event.target was the inner , not the `; } const days = []; for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) { const d = new Date(Date.now() - i * 86400000); const iso = d.toISOString().slice(0, 10); const log = (state.sunlightLog && state.sunlightLog[iso]) || {}; days.push({ label: ['Su','M','T','W','Th','F','Sa'][d.getDay()], morning: !!log.morning, midday: !!log.midday, isToday: i === 0 }); } const morningHits = days.filter(d => d.morning).length; const dayHtml = days.map(d => { const outer = d.isToday ? 'background:var(--accent-primary);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 3px;margin:-5px -3px;color:white;' : ''; const labelColor = d.isToday ? 'white' : 'var(--text-tertiary)'; const labelWeight = d.isToday ? '700' : '400'; const barBg = d.isToday ? (d.morning ? 'white' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.38)') : (d.morning ? 'var(--accent-primary)' : 'var(--border-subtle)'); const outline = d.isToday ? '' : ''; return `
${d.label}
${d.isToday ? '
TODAY
' : ''}
`; }).join(''); summaryEl.innerHTML = `
${dayHtml}
Morning sun: ${morningHits} of 7 days
`; } function renderHealthBody() { // Weight summary const wEl = document.getElementById('health-body-weight-summary'); if (wEl) { const log = (state && state.weightLog) ? state.weightLog : []; if (log.length > 0) { const latest = log[log.length - 1]; const trend = (typeof getTrendWeight === 'function') ? getTrendWeight() : null; wEl.innerHTML = `
Latest
${latest.weight} lb
${trend ? `
7-day trend
${trend.toFixed(1)} lb
` : ''}
${log.length} weigh-in${log.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} logged
`; } else { wEl.innerHTML = `
No weight logged yet. Daily weigh-ins help Sorrel adapt your macros.
`; } } // Photos summary const pEl = document.getElementById('health-body-photos-summary'); if (pEl) { let photoCount = 0; try { const stored = localStorage.getItem('progress-photos'); if (stored) { const arr = JSON.parse(stored); if (Array.isArray(arr)) photoCount = arr.length; } } catch (e) {} if (photoCount > 0) { pEl.innerHTML = `
${photoCount} progress photo${photoCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''} stored.
`; } else { pEl.innerHTML = `
No photos yet. Front + side at the same time of day, weekly, gives the clearest progress signal.
`; } } } function renderHealthSleep() { // Render directly into the Health panel — avoids duplicate-ID bug where // input/button IDs would conflict with the original (now-hidden) Sleep section. const dest = document.getElementById('health-sleep-content'); if (!dest) return; if (typeof renderSleepTab === 'function') { try { renderSleepTab(dest); } catch (e) { console.error('Sleep render in Health hub failed:', e); } } } function renderHealthGut(targetId) { // v1.3: Gut moved from Health sub-tab to a collapsible card at the // bottom of Diary. Function takes an optional target so it can fill // either location; defaults to the new diary slot. const destId = targetId || 'diary-gut-content'; const dest = document.getElementById(destId); if (!dest) return; if (typeof renderGutHealth === 'function') { try { renderGutHealth(dest); } catch (e) { console.error('Gut render failed:', e); } } } function renderHealthRecovery(targetId) { // In v1.3 Recovery moved from Health to Train. The function now accepts // an optional target ID so the same render logic feeds either location. // Defaults to 'train-recovery-content' (where Recovery lives now); // older callers passing no arg get the new default. const destId = targetId || 'train-recovery-content'; const dest = document.getElementById(destId); if (!dest) return; if (typeof ensureRecoveryState === 'function') ensureRecoveryState(); const baseline = (typeof computeRecoveryBaseline === 'function') ? computeRecoveryBaseline() : null; const todayEntry = (state.recoveryLog && state.recoveryLog[todayISO()]) || {}; const rec = (typeof getTodaysIntensityRecommendation === 'function') ? getTodaysIntensityRecommendation() : null; // Past 7 days for inline chart const past7 = []; for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) { const d = new Date(Date.now() - i * 86400000); const iso = d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'); const entry = (state.recoveryLog && state.recoveryLog[iso]) || {}; past7.push({ day: ['Su','M','T','W','Th','F','Sa'][d.getDay()], score: entry.recoveryScore, hrv: entry.hrv, level: (typeof getRecoveryLevel === 'function') ? getRecoveryLevel(iso) : null, isToday: i === 0 // v1.5.1 Issue #11: mark today for visual distinction }); } const levelColors = { optimal: '#0a7d5a', good: '#d97706', low: '#f59e0b', depleted: '#dc2626' }; dest.innerHTML = `
⚡ Today's Recovery
${rec ? `
${rec.emoji}
${rec.label}
Training: ${rec.training}
Nutrition: ${rec.nutrition}
` : `
📊
No recovery data yet
Log your HRV or sync from Whoop / Oura / Garmin to see today's recommendation.
`}
7-day recovery
${past7.map(d => `
${d.day}
${d.isToday ? '
TODAY
' : ''}
`).join('')}
${baseline ? `
Your baseline: ${baseline.mean} ms HRV (±${baseline.stdDev}, n=${baseline.sampleSize})
` : ''}
🧠 How recovery adjusts your plan

When today's HRV is significantly below your personal baseline, the algorithm reduces today's carbs and overall calories while preserving protein — a one-day override that doesn't permanently change your targets.

🟢 Optimal (≥+0.5σ): push hard, full carbs
🟡 Good (±0.5σ): standard plan
🟠 Low (-0.5 to -1.5σ): ease up, +10% protein
🔴 Depleted (<-1.5σ): rest day, -15% carbs, -150 cal
`; } // ─── Settings Sheet ───────────────────────────────────────────── // Triggered by the gear icon in the header. Houses Profile, Analytics, // Progress trends, Tools (IF Timer, Custom Foods, Photos, Export). // These are the lower-frequency / management surfaces — separate from // the daily tracking tabs in the bottom nav. function openSettingsSheet() { const existing = document.getElementById('settingsSheet'); if (existing) existing.remove(); // v1.4.1: Pruned the items list further: // • Removed 'progress' — already in bottom nav. // • Removed 'retrospective' — lives as hero card at top of Progress. // • Removed 'analytics' — consolidating into Progress as deep-dive. // • Removed 'premium' — custom foods moved to Diary, IF timer // moving to Routine; this tab is empty. // Settings sheet is now just Profile + theme toggle + about block. const items = [ { id: 'profile', emoji: '👤', label: 'Profile & Goals', detail: 'Edit your targets and info', type: 'profile' } ]; const sheet = document.createElement('div'); sheet.id = 'settingsSheet'; sheet.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;animation:fadeIn 0.2s ease;'; sheet.innerHTML = `

⚙️ Settings & More

${getCurrentTheme() === 'dark' ? '🌙' : '☀️'}
Appearance
${getCurrentTheme() === 'dark' ? 'Dark' : 'Light'} · tap to switch
${items.map(item => ` `).join('')}
Sorrel
Nutrition that adapts to you
v1.5.3
Made with care · Build v1.5.3-sorrel
`; sheet.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === sheet) sheet.remove(); }); document.body.appendChild(sheet); } function navigateFromSettingsSheet(id, type) { const sheet = document.getElementById('settingsSheet'); if (sheet) sheet.remove(); setTimeout(() => { if (type === 'profile') { // v1.5: route to inline rows screen, not the 8-page reflow. // The old behavior is still available as "Re-take full assessment" // inside the rows screen. if (typeof openProfileRows === 'function') openProfileRows(); else if (typeof openProfileEdit === 'function') openProfileEdit(); else if (typeof openProfileModal === 'function') openProfileModal(); } else if (type === 'retrospective') { if (typeof openRetrospective === 'function') openRetrospective(); } else { switchTab(id); } }, 50); } // ─── v1.5 Profile rows — Apple Settings inline-edit pattern ──────────── // Audit recommendation #5: editing one profile field should not require // the 8-page onboarding reflow. This sheet gives a row-per-field with // inline editing — single tap to edit one field, save, done. // // Fields exposed: name, age, weight, height, gender, activity, goal, // weekly budget. Cuisine prefs, allergens, hormonal/stress assessment // fields stay behind "Re-take full assessment" because they're better // answered as a guided flow. function openProfileRows() { if (!profile) return; const existing = document.getElementById('profileRowsSheet'); if (existing) existing.remove(); const row = (label, value, editFn, isLast) => ` `; // Format human-readable values const heightDisplay = profile.height ? `${Math.floor(profile.height / 12)}' ${profile.height % 12}"` : 'Not set'; const goalDisplay = ({ 'lose_fat': 'Lose fat', 'maintain': 'Maintain', 'gain_muscle': 'Gain muscle', 'recomp': 'Recomp' })[profile.goal] || profile.goal || 'Not set'; const activityDisplay = ({ 'sedentary': 'Sedentary', 'light': 'Light activity', 'moderate': 'Moderate activity', 'active': 'Active', 'very_active': 'Very active' })[profile.activity] || profile.activity || 'Not set'; const genderDisplay = profile.gender ? (profile.gender.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + profile.gender.slice(1)) : 'Not set'; const sheet = document.createElement('div'); sheet.id = 'profileRowsSheet'; sheet.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;animation:fadeIn 0.2s ease;'; sheet.innerHTML = `

Profile & Goals

${row('Name', profile.name || 'Not set', "openProfileFieldEdit('name')", false)} ${row('Age', profile.age ? profile.age + ' yrs' : 'Not set', "openProfileFieldEdit('age')", false)} ${row('Gender', genderDisplay, "openProfileFieldEdit('gender')", false)} ${row('Height', heightDisplay, "openProfileFieldEdit('height')", false)} ${row('Current weight', profile.weight ? profile.weight + ' lb' : 'Not set', "openProfileFieldEdit('weight')", true)}
Goals
${row('Goal', goalDisplay, "openProfileFieldEdit('goal')", false)} ${row('Activity level', activityDisplay, "openProfileFieldEdit('activity')", false)} ${row('Weekly budget', '$' + (profile.weeklyBudget || 0).toFixed(0), "document.getElementById('profileRowsSheet').remove(); openBudgetEditModal();", true)}

Cuisine preferences, allergens, and the hormonal / stress / sleep assessment live in the full flow.

`; sheet.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === sheet) sheet.remove(); }); document.body.appendChild(sheet); } // Single-field edit modal. Accepts a field key ('name','age','weight', // 'height','gender','activity','goal') and renders the appropriate // input control. On save, updates profile + recomputes targets if a // downstream-affecting field changed (weight/height/age/gender/activity/goal). function openProfileFieldEdit(field) { if (!profile) return; const existing = document.getElementById('profileFieldModal'); if (existing) existing.remove(); // Field config: label, current value, input HTML, save handler const cfg = { name: { label: 'Name', input: `` }, age: { label: 'Age', input: `` }, weight: { label: 'Current weight (lb)', input: `` }, height: { label: 'Height', input: `
` }, gender: { label: 'Gender', input: ` ` }, activity: { label: 'Activity level', input: ` ` }, goal: { label: 'Goal', input: ` ` } }; const c = cfg[field]; if (!c) return; const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'profileFieldModal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:10001;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;'; modal.innerHTML = `

${c.label}

${c.input}
`; modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); }); document.body.appendChild(modal); setTimeout(() => { const inp = document.getElementById('pf-input') || document.getElementById('pf-input-ft'); if (inp && typeof inp.focus === 'function') { inp.focus(); if (inp.select) inp.select(); } }, 50); } function saveProfileField(field) { if (!profile) return; // Read input(s) and validate. Reject silently with a toast if invalid; // the modal stays open so the user can correct. let newValue; if (field === 'height') { const ft = parseInt(document.getElementById('pf-input-ft')?.value); const inch = parseInt(document.getElementById('pf-input-in')?.value); if (!isFinite(ft) || ft < 3 || ft > 8 || !isFinite(inch) || inch < 0 || inch > 11) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Enter valid height'); return; } newValue = ft * 12 + inch; } else { const inp = document.getElementById('pf-input'); if (!inp) return; newValue = inp.value; if (field === 'age' || field === 'weight') { newValue = parseFloat(newValue); if (!isFinite(newValue) || newValue <= 0) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Enter a valid number'); return; } } if (field === 'name' && (!newValue || !newValue.trim())) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Name cannot be empty'); return; } } // Save to profile. profile[field] = newValue; // Recompute downstream targets if a TDEE-affecting field changed. // (weight, height, age, gender, activity, goal all feed targetCalories.) const recomputeFields = ['weight', 'height', 'age', 'gender', 'activity', 'goal']; if (recomputeFields.includes(field) && typeof recomputeTargetsFromProfile === 'function') { try { recomputeTargetsFromProfile(); } catch (e) { console.warn('recompute failed:', e); } } try { localStorage.setItem('user-profile', JSON.stringify(profile)); } catch (e) {} // Close field modal and refresh the rows list to show the new value. const m = document.getElementById('profileFieldModal'); if (m) m.remove(); const rows = document.getElementById('profileRowsSheet'); if (rows) rows.remove(); setTimeout(openProfileRows, 60); // Refresh main planner if visible (rings/macros may have changed). if (typeof updateMainPagePlanner === 'function') updateMainPagePlanner(); if (typeof updateMacroSummary === 'function') updateMacroSummary(); if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Saved'); } // Best-effort target recomputation. If a dedicated function exists, defer // to it; otherwise this is a stub that documents the contract. function recomputeTargetsFromProfile() { // Try the existing TDEE/macro calculator if available. if (typeof calculateTargets === 'function') return calculateTargets(); if (typeof computeTargets === 'function') return computeTargets(); if (typeof recalculateMacros === 'function') return recalculateMacros(); // Otherwise, pattern detection at least re-runs on next load via the // version-keyed backfill; targets will follow on next assessment cycle. } // ─── About Sorrel: brand-reinforcing detail screens ──────────────── // Apple's About-screen pattern. Each item opens a modal with grouped content. // Reinforces trust signals and gives the user a place to see the brand, // version, and the team's voice — even after onboarding fades. // ─── Macro detail expansion (tap rings to drill in) ──────────────── // Apple Fitness pattern: tap the rings to reveal per-macro detail with // remaining grams and over/under indicators. Information only when asked. function toggleMacroDetail() { const panel = document.getElementById('macro-detail-expanded'); if (!panel) return; if (panel.style.display === 'block') { panel.style.display = 'none'; } else { // Pull current values from the visible spans (already kept in sync) const proteinNow = parseInt(document.getElementById('protein-today').textContent) || 0; const carbsNow = parseInt(document.getElementById('carbs-today').textContent) || 0; const fatNow = parseInt(document.getElementById('fat-today').textContent) || 0; const calNow = parseInt(document.getElementById('calories-today').textContent) || 0; renderMacroDetailExpanded(proteinNow, carbsNow, fatNow, calNow); panel.style.display = 'block'; } } function renderMacroDetailExpanded(proteinNow, carbsNow, fatNow, calNow) { if (!profile) return; const target = (curr, goal, unit, color) => { const pct = goal > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round((curr / goal) * 100)) : 0; const remaining = Math.max(0, goal - curr); const over = curr > goal ? curr - goal : 0; const statusText = over > 0 ? `+${over}${unit} over` : remaining > 0 ? `${remaining}${unit} to go` : `target hit`; return `
${curr}${unit} of ${goal}${unit}
${statusText}
`; }; const calTarget = profile.targetCalories || profile.calories || 2000; const calRemaining = Math.max(0, calTarget - calNow); const calOver = calNow > calTarget ? calNow - calTarget : 0; const calStatus = calOver > 0 ? `${calOver} cal over target` : `${calRemaining} cal remaining`; const html = ` ${target(proteinNow, profile.protein, 'g', 'var(--accent-primary)')} ${target(carbsNow, profile.carbs, 'g', 'var(--accent-secondary)')} ${target(fatNow, profile.fat, 'g', '#f59e0b')}
Calories ${calStatus}
`; const target_el = document.getElementById('macro-detail-content'); if (target_el) target_el.innerHTML = html; } function showAboutDetail(topic) { const settingsSheet = document.getElementById('settingsSheet'); if (settingsSheet) settingsSheet.remove(); const content = { 'whats-new': { title: "What's new in Sorrel", body: `
VERSION 1.2 May 2026
A calmer, smarter Sorrel.
  • ·Activity Rings. Today's macros at a single glance — no more hunting numbers across cards.
  • ·Voice logging. Say what you ate. Sorrel parses it.
  • ·AI photo log. Snap a meal, get the macros.
  • ·Recovery-aware adjustments. Slept poorly? Sorrel bumps protein. Trained hard? Carbs go up.
  • ·Routine integration. Morning and evening rituals on the home screen.
  • ·30-day retrospective. Look back without scrolling forever.
` }, 'privacy': { title: 'Privacy', body: `
Your data lives on your device.

Sorrel stores everything you log — meals, weights, photos, routines — locally on your device using your browser's storage. We never upload it.

Photos for AI logging are sent to Anthropic's servers for analysis only when you explicitly use the photo log feature. They are not retained.

Branded food searches hit the Open Food Facts public database. We send the search term and nothing else.

No accounts. No tracking. No ads. Sorrel works fully offline once loaded.

` }, 'terms': { title: 'Terms of use', body: `

Sorrel is a tool for tracking nutrition and supporting healthy habits. The macro targets, calorie estimates, hydration goals, and routine recommendations are general-population guidance based on widely-accepted exercise and nutrition science.

Sorrel is not medical advice. If you are pregnant, managing a chronic condition, recovering from an eating disorder, or working with a clinician on body composition, please use Sorrel under their supervision.

By using Sorrel you agree that the recommendations are informational only and that you take responsibility for your own health decisions.

` }, 'acknowledgments': { title: 'Acknowledgments', body: `

Sorrel stands on the shoulders of open work. With gratitude:

  • Open Food Facts — the global, open food database.
  • Anthropic Claude — for the AI photo and voice log analysis.
  • Chart.js — for the trend visualizations.
  • QuaggaJS — for in-browser barcode scanning.

Nutrition methodology informed by the work of researchers including Layne Norton, Bill Campbell, and the International Society of Sports Nutrition.

` } }; const item = content[topic]; if (!item) return; const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'aboutDetailModal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;animation:fadeIn 0.2s ease;'; modal.innerHTML = `

${item.title}

${item.body}
`; modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); }); document.body.appendChild(modal); } // ─── 30-Day Retrospective (P2 #11) ──────────────────────────────── // Apple Fitness Year-in-Review pattern, condensed. Walks the user through // a series of "story panels" — one big stat per panel, swipe/tap to advance. // The narrative arc is: how often you logged → what you ate most → your // macro pattern → your weight trend → your routine consistency → your win. // // Why this works for retention: it's the moment users *feel* what Sorrel // has been doing for them. Without this, the data is silent. With it, the // data tells a story they can share. function openRetrospective() { const data = computeRetrospectiveData(); if (data.daysWithData < 7) { // Not enough data yet — show a friendly empty state const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'retrospectiveModal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;animation:fadeIn 0.2s ease;'; modal.innerHTML = `
🌿

Your retrospective is growing

Log meals for at least a week and Sorrel will show you a story of your eating pattern, your macros, and your wins. ${data.daysWithData} of 7 days logged so far.

`; modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); }); document.body.appendChild(modal); return; } // Build the panel sequence retrospectiveState = { panelIndex: 0, panels: buildRetrospectivePanels(data) }; renderRetrospectivePanel(); } let retrospectiveState = null; function computeRetrospectiveData() { const today = new Date(); const thirtyDaysAgo = new Date(today.getTime() - 30 * 86400000); let daysWithData = 0; let totalMeals = 0; let totalCalories = 0; let totalProtein = 0; let totalCarbs = 0; let totalFat = 0; const foodFrequency = {}; // name → count let bestStreak = 0; let currentStreak = 0; let weighIns = 0; // Walk the last 30 days if (foodDiary && foodDiary.entries) { for (let d = 0; d < 30; d++) { const dt = new Date(today.getTime() - d * 86400000); const yyyy = dt.getFullYear(); const mm = String(dt.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'); const dd = String(dt.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'); const dateKey = `${yyyy}-${mm}-${dd}`; const entry = foodDiary.entries[dateKey]; if (entry) { const allFoods = [...(entry.breakfast || []), ...(entry.lunch || []), ...(entry.dinner || []), ...(entry.snacks || [])]; if (allFoods.length > 0) { daysWithData++; currentStreak++; if (currentStreak > bestStreak) bestStreak = currentStreak; totalMeals += allFoods.length; allFoods.forEach(f => { totalCalories += f.calories || 0; totalProtein += f.protein || 0; totalCarbs += f.carbs || 0; totalFat += f.fat || 0; const key = (f.name || '').toLowerCase().trim(); if (key) foodFrequency[key] = (foodFrequency[key] || 0) + 1; }); } else { currentStreak = 0; } } else { currentStreak = 0; } } } // Weigh-ins in last 30 days if (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state.weightLog && Array.isArray(state.weightLog)) { state.weightLog.forEach(e => { const d = new Date(e.date || e.timestamp || 0); if (d >= thirtyDaysAgo) weighIns++; }); } // Top 3 most-logged foods const topFoods = Object.entries(foodFrequency) .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]) .slice(0, 3) .map(([name, count]) => ({ name: name.replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase()), count })); // Weight delta (first vs. last in 30-day window) let weightDelta = null; if (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state.weightLog && state.weightLog.length >= 2) { const recent = state.weightLog.slice(-30); if (recent.length >= 2) { weightDelta = recent[recent.length - 1].weight - recent[0].weight; } } const avgCalories = daysWithData > 0 ? Math.round(totalCalories / daysWithData) : 0; const avgProtein = daysWithData > 0 ? Math.round(totalProtein / daysWithData) : 0; const avgCarbs = daysWithData > 0 ? Math.round(totalCarbs / daysWithData) : 0; const avgFat = daysWithData > 0 ? Math.round(totalFat / daysWithData) : 0; return { daysWithData, totalMeals, avgCalories, avgProtein, avgCarbs, avgFat, topFoods, bestStreak, weighIns, weightDelta }; } function buildRetrospectivePanels(d) { // Each panel: { headline, statBig, statLabel, body, gradient } // Apple "story" style — one anchoring stat, brief context, hold on screen. const goalIsLoss = profile && ['lose','lose_fat_moderate','moderate_fatloss','fat_loss'].includes(profile.goal); const panels = [ { headline: 'Your last 30 days', statBig: d.daysWithData, statLabel: `day${d.daysWithData !== 1 ? 's' : ''} logged`, body: d.daysWithData >= 25 ? "That's deeply consistent. The kind of consistency that compounds." : d.daysWithData >= 15 ? "You showed up more days than not. That's the work." : "Every logged day teaches Sorrel a little more about you.", gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg,#064e3b 0%,#0a7d5a 50%,#10b981 100%)' }, { headline: 'Meals tracked', statBig: d.totalMeals, statLabel: 'foods or meals logged', body: `That's an average of ${(d.totalMeals / Math.max(d.daysWithData, 1)).toFixed(1)} per day. Each one a moment of attention.`, gradient: 'var(--accent-gradient)' } ]; if (d.topFoods.length > 0) { panels.push({ headline: 'Your most-logged foods', statBig: '', statLabel: '', bodyHTML: `
${d.topFoods.map((f, i) => `
${i+1}
${escapeHtml(f.name)}
${f.count}× this month
`).join('')}
`, body: 'These are the foods that fed your month.', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981 0%,#0a7d5a 100%)' }); } panels.push({ headline: 'Your daily pattern', statBig: d.avgCalories.toLocaleString(), statLabel: 'calories per day on average', body: `${d.avgProtein}g protein · ${d.avgCarbs}g carbs · ${d.avgFat}g fat — the rhythm of your nourishment.`, gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg,#0a7d5a 0%,#064e3b 100%)' }); if (d.weightDelta !== null) { const direction = d.weightDelta > 0.5 ? 'up' : d.weightDelta < -0.5 ? 'down' : 'steady'; const trendText = direction === 'up' ? `+${d.weightDelta.toFixed(1)} lb this month` : direction === 'down' ? `${d.weightDelta.toFixed(1)} lb this month` : 'within a pound — steady'; const goalContext = goalIsLoss && direction === 'down' ? "Moving toward your goal. Keep the work." : goalIsLoss && direction === 'up' ? "Tide will turn — adherence and patience." : !goalIsLoss && direction === 'steady' ? "Maintenance is its own kind of mastery." : "Progress is rarely linear. Trust the trend, not the day."; panels.push({ headline: 'Your weight trend', statBig: trendText, statLabel: '', body: goalContext, gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg,#064e3b 0%,#10b981 100%)' }); } if (d.bestStreak >= 3) { panels.push({ headline: 'Your longest streak', statBig: d.bestStreak, statLabel: `consecutive day${d.bestStreak !== 1 ? 's' : ''} logged`, body: d.bestStreak >= 14 ? "That's habit territory. The kind of behavior that becomes who you are." : d.bestStreak >= 7 ? "A full week of showing up. That's where the compounding starts." : "Building. Each day is the foundation for the next.", gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981 0%,#0a7d5a 100%)' }); } // Closing panel — the brand voice panels.push({ headline: 'Sorrel, with you', statBig: '', statLabel: '', body: 'Nutrition that adapts to you. Quietly, consistently, intentionally. Here\'s to the next 30.', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg,#064e3b 0%,#0a7d5a 50%,#10b981 100%)', isFinal: true }); return panels; } function renderRetrospectivePanel() { if (!retrospectiveState) return; const { panelIndex, panels } = retrospectiveState; if (panelIndex < 0 || panelIndex >= panels.length) return; const panel = panels[panelIndex]; const existing = document.getElementById('retrospectiveModal'); if (existing) existing.remove(); const progressDots = panels.map((_, i) => `
`).join(''); const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'retrospectiveModal'; modal.style.cssText = `position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:${panel.gradient};z-index:10000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;animation:fadeIn 0.3s ease;`; modal.innerHTML = `
${progressDots}
Sorrel · Last 30 days
${escapeHtml(panel.headline)}
${panel.statBig ? `
${escapeHtml(String(panel.statBig))}
` : ''} ${panel.statLabel ? `
${escapeHtml(panel.statLabel)}
` : ''} ${panel.bodyHTML || ''}
${escapeHtml(panel.body)}
${panel.isFinal ? ` ` : ''}
${!panel.isFinal ? `
Tap to continue · ${panelIndex + 1} of ${panels.length}
` : ''} `; document.body.appendChild(modal); } function advanceRetrospective(direction) { if (!retrospectiveState) return; const next = retrospectiveState.panelIndex + direction; if (next < 0) return; // Already at first if (next >= retrospectiveState.panels.length) { closeRetrospective(); return; } retrospectiveState.panelIndex = next; renderRetrospectivePanel(); } function closeRetrospective() { const modal = document.getElementById('retrospectiveModal'); if (modal) modal.remove(); retrospectiveState = null; } function openMoreSheet() { // Remove any existing instance const existing = document.getElementById('moreSheet'); if (existing) existing.remove(); const items = [ { id: 'shopping', emoji: '🛒', label: 'Shop', detail: 'Grocery list · store comparison' }, { id: 'progress', emoji: '📈', label: 'Progress', detail: 'Trends & charts' }, { id: 'routine', emoji: '⏰', label: 'Routine', detail: 'Morning + evening protocols' }, { id: 'gut', emoji: '🦠', label: 'Gut Health', detail: 'Fermented foods · probiotics' }, { id: 'analytics', emoji: '📊', label: 'Analytics', detail: 'Deep dives' }, { id: 'premium', emoji: '🛠️', label: 'Tools', detail: 'IF timer · photos · custom foods · export' } ]; const sheet = document.createElement('div'); sheet.id = 'moreSheet'; sheet.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:9999;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;animation:fadeIn 0.2s ease;'; sheet.innerHTML = `

More

${items.map(item => ` `).join('')}
`; // Click outside to close sheet.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === sheet) sheet.remove(); }); document.body.appendChild(sheet); } function navigateFromMoreSheet(tabId) { const sheet = document.getElementById('moreSheet'); if (sheet) sheet.remove(); // Slight delay so the sheet animates away before tab switches (avoids visual jank) setTimeout(() => switchTab(tabId), 50); } function navigateFromMoreSheetToProfile() { const sheet = document.getElementById('moreSheet'); if (sheet) sheet.remove(); if (typeof openProfileEdit === 'function') { openProfileEdit(); } else if (typeof openProfileModal === 'function') { openProfileModal(); } } // State Persistence function loadState() { const saved = localStorage.getItem('tracker-state'); if (saved) { state = JSON.parse(saved); if (!state.currentDay) state.currentDay = 1; if (!state.streak) state.streak = 0; if (!state.lastActiveDay) state.lastActiveDay = 0; if (!state.checkins) state.checkins = []; // Initialize new state properties if missing if (!state.breakfastSwaps) state.breakfastSwaps = {}; if (!state.weeklyMealPlan) { state.weeklyMealPlan = { day1: { breakfast: null, lunch: null, dinner: null }, day2: { breakfast: null, lunch: null, dinner: null }, day3: { breakfast: null, lunch: null, dinner: null }, day4: { breakfast: null, lunch: null, dinner: null }, day5: { breakfast: null, lunch: null, dinner: null }, day6: { breakfast: null, lunch: null, dinner: null }, day7: { breakfast: null, lunch: null, dinner: null } }; } if (!state.budgetOptimizationSuggestions) state.budgetOptimizationSuggestions = []; if (state.meals && !state.meals.day1 && Object.keys(state.meals).some(k => k.startsWith('m'))) { const oldMeals = state.meals; const oldHydration = state.hydration; state.meals = { day1: oldMeals }; state.hydration = { day1: oldHydration }; } if (!state.storeAssignments) { state.storeAssignments = {}; shoppingCategories.forEach(cat => { cat.items.forEach(item => { state.storeAssignments[item.id] = item.defaultStore; }); }); } // If favorites are set, calculate rotation and budgets if (state.favoriteLunches && state.favoriteLunches.length > 0 && state.favoriteDinners && state.favoriteDinners.length > 0 && profile) { console.log('Initializing favorites system from saved state...'); calculateMealRotation(); distributeRemainingMacros(); calculateWeeklyBudget(); } } render(); } // ======================================== // DYNAMIC MEAL PLANNING & SHOPPING SYSTEM // ======================================== // Parse ingredient string like "14.2 oz chicken breast, cubed" into structured data function parseIngredientString(ingredientStr) { // Extract quantity and unit - HANDLE FRACTIONS AND PLURALS const quantityMatch = ingredientStr.match(/^([\d./]+)\s*(oz|lb|cups?|tbsps?|tsps?|cloves?|bulbs?|scoops?|slices?|each|bag|cans?|box|boxes|container|jar|bottle|packet|package)?/i); if (!quantityMatch) { // No quantity specified (like "Salt, pepper") console.log(` 🔍 No quantity in: "${ingredientStr}"`); return { quantity: 0, unit: 'misc', ingredient: ingredientStr.toLowerCase(), originalText: ingredientStr }; } // Parse quantity - handle fractions like "1/2" let quantity = 0; const qtyStr = quantityMatch[1]; if (qtyStr.includes('/')) { // Fraction: "1/2" or "1 1/2" const parts = qtyStr.split(/\s+/); // Split on whitespace let whole = 0; let fraction = 0; for (const part of parts) { if (part.includes('/')) { const [num, denom] = part.split('/'); fraction = parseInt(num) / parseInt(denom); } else { whole = parseFloat(part); } } quantity = whole + fraction; } else { quantity = parseFloat(qtyStr); } // Normalize unit to singular form let unit = (quantityMatch[2] || 'each').toLowerCase(); unit = unit.replace(/s$/, ''); // Remove trailing 's' for plurals // Extract ingredient name (everything after the unit) const remainingText = ingredientStr.substring(quantityMatch[0].length).trim(); const ingredientName = remainingText.split(',')[0].toLowerCase(); // Remove preparation notes after comma console.log(` 🔍 Parsing: "${ingredientStr}" → qty=${quantity}, unit=${unit}, name="${ingredientName}"`); // Map to database keys - COMPREHENSIVE MAPPING WITH COMPOUND NAMES const ingredientMap = { // Proteins 'chicken breast': 'chicken_breast', 'chicken': 'chicken_breast', 'ground turkey': 'ground_turkey', 'turkey': 'ground_turkey', 'eggs': 'eggs', 'egg': 'eggs', 'greek yogurt': 'greek_yogurt', 'greek yogurt (plain': 'greek_yogurt', 'yogurt': 'greek_yogurt', 'plain yogurt': 'greek_yogurt', 'tuna cans': 'tuna_cans', 'tuna': 'tuna_cans', 'canned tuna': 'tuna_cans', 'tofu': 'tofu', 'firm tofu': 'tofu_firm', 'tempeh': 'tempeh', 'edamame': 'edamame', 'lentils': 'lentils_dry', 'dry lentils': 'lentils_dry', 'cooked lentils': 'lentils_dry', 'chickpeas': 'chickpeas_canned', 'canned chickpeas': 'chickpeas_canned', 'feta cheese': 'feta_cheese', 'feta': 'feta_cheese', 'cheese': 'cheese_shredded', 'shredded cheese': 'cheese_shredded', 'cheddar cheese': 'cheese_shredded', 'cheese (cheddar or swiss)': 'cheese_shredded', 'mozzarella': 'mozzarella', 'mozzarella cheese': 'mozzarella', 'beef sirloin': 'beef_sirloin', 'beef': 'beef_sirloin', 'beef or chicken': 'beef_sirloin', 'sirloin': 'beef_sirloin', 'shrimp': 'shrimp', 'salmon': 'salmon', 'salmon fillet': 'salmon', 'cottage cheese': 'greek_yogurt', 'protein powder': 'protein_powder', 'scoop protein powder': 'protein_powder', 'scoop protein powder (vanilla)': 'protein_powder', 'scoop protein powder (optional boost)': 'protein_powder', 'scoops protein powder': 'protein_powder', 'scoops protein powder (vanilla)': 'protein_powder', // Grains 'brown rice': 'brown_rice', 'rice': 'brown_rice', 'cooked rice': 'brown_rice', 'red lentil pasta': 'lentil_pasta', 'red lentil pasta (dry)': 'lentil_pasta', 'lentil pasta': 'lentil_pasta', 'pasta': 'lentil_pasta', 'spaghetti': 'lentil_pasta', 'noodles': 'lentil_pasta', 'whole grain bread': 'whole_grain_bread', 'whole wheat bread': 'bread', 'slices whole wheat bread': 'bread', 'slices whole grain bread': 'whole_grain_bread', 'bread': 'bread', 'toast': 'bread', 'large whole wheat tortilla': 'ezekiel_tortillas', 'ezekiel bread': 'ezekiel_bread', 'ezekiel 4:9 bread': 'ezekiel_bread', 'ezekiel cereal': 'ezekiel_cereal', 'ezekiel 4:9 cereal': 'ezekiel_cereal', 'ezekiel tortillas': 'ezekiel_tortillas', 'tortillas': 'ezekiel_tortillas', 'quinoa': 'quinoa', 'oats': 'oats', 'rolled oats': 'oats', 'rolled oats (dry)': 'oats', 'rolled oats or granola': 'oats', 'oatmeal': 'oats', 'sweet potato': 'sweet_potatoes', 'sweet potatoes': 'sweet_potatoes', 'kefir': 'kefir', 'plain kefir': 'kefir', // Produce 'berries': 'berries', 'fresh berries': 'berries', 'frozen berries': 'berries', 'mixed berries': 'berries', 'fresh berries (blueberrie': 'berries', 'blueberries': 'berries', 'strawberries': 'berries', 'banana': 'bananas', 'bananas': 'bananas', 'frozen banana': 'bananas', 'spinach': 'spinach', 'fresh spinach': 'spinach', 'tomatoes': 'tomatoes', 'tomato': 'tomatoes', 'fresh tomatoes': 'tomatoes', 'diced tomatoes': 'tomatoes', 'cherry tomatoes': 'cherry_tomatoes', 'onion': 'onions', 'onions': 'onions', 'yellow onion': 'onions', 'red onion': 'onions', 'avocado': 'avocados', 'avocados': 'avocados', 'garlic': 'garlic', 'garlic cloves': 'garlic', 'garlic bulb': 'garlic', 'bell pepper': 'bell_peppers', 'bell peppers': 'bell_peppers', 'pepper': 'bell_peppers', 'peppers': 'bell_peppers', 'red bell pepper': 'bell_peppers', 'green bell pepper': 'bell_peppers', 'broccoli': 'broccoli', 'broccoli crown': 'broccoli', 'carrots': 'carrots', 'carrot': 'carrots', 'cucumber': 'cucumber', 'lettuce': 'lettuce', 'romaine lettuce': 'lettuce', 'kale': 'kale', 'zucchini': 'zucchini', 'mushrooms': 'mushrooms', 'cauliflower': 'cauliflower', // Canned/Jarred 'crushed tomatoes': 'crushed_tomatoes', 'canned tomatoes': 'crushed_tomatoes', 'tomato sauce': 'crushed_tomatoes', 'marinara sauce': 'crushed_tomatoes', 'tomato soup (canned or homemade)': 'crushed_tomatoes', 'black beans': 'black_beans', 'beans': 'black_beans', 'canned beans': 'black_beans', 'white beans': 'white_beans', 'white beans (cannellini)': 'white_beans', 'cannellini beans': 'white_beans', 'pinto beans': 'pinto_beans', 'red lentils': 'red_lentils', 'chicken broth': 'chicken_broth', 'broth': 'chicken_broth', 'vegetable broth': 'vegetable_broth', // Sauces & Condiments 'soy sauce': 'soy_sauce', 'bbq sauce': 'bbq_sauce', 'salsa': 'salsa', 'hot sauce': 'hot_sauce', 'sriracha': 'hot_sauce', 'teriyaki sauce': 'teriyaki_sauce', 'hoisin sauce': 'hoisin_sauce', 'tahini': 'tahini', 'hummus': 'hummus', 'peanut butter': 'peanut_butter', 'almond butter': 'almond_butter', 'almond butter or walnuts': 'almond_butter', 'peanut butter or almond butter': 'peanut_butter', 'honey': 'honey', 'honey or maple syrup': 'honey', 'honey or maple syrup (optional)': 'honey', 'maple syrup': 'maple_syrup', 'caesar dressing': 'caesar_dressing', 'lemon juice': 'lemon', // Oils & Fats 'olive oil': 'olive_oil', 'oil': 'olive_oil', 'extra virgin olive oil': 'olive_oil', 'coconut oil': 'coconut_oil', 'sesame oil': 'sesame_oil', 'butter': 'butter', 'ghee': 'ghee', // Spices & Seasonings 'salt': 'salt', 'pepper': 'pepper', 'black pepper': 'pepper', 'cumin': 'cumin', 'coriander': 'coriander', 'turmeric': 'turmeric', 'paprika': 'paprika', 'chili powder': 'chili_powder', 'cayenne pepper': 'cayenne', 'garam masala': 'garam_masala', 'italian seasoning': 'italian_seasoning', 'oregano': 'oregano', 'basil': 'basil', 'thyme': 'thyme', 'rosemary': 'rosemary', 'garlic powder': 'garlic_powder', 'onion powder': 'onion_powder', 'cinnamon': 'cinnamon', 'ginger': 'ginger', 'taco seasoning': 'taco_seasoning', // Dairy & Alternatives 'milk': 'almond_milk', 'almond milk': 'almond_milk', 'unsweetened almond milk': 'almond_milk', 'heavy cream': 'heavy_cream', 'cream': 'heavy_cream', 'sour cream': 'sour_cream', 'parmesan': 'parmesan', 'parmesan cheese': 'parmesan', // Misc 'baking powder': 'baking_powder', 'vanilla extract': 'vanilla_extract', 'lemon': 'lemon', 'lime': 'lime', 'vinegar': 'vinegar', 'apple cider vinegar': 'vinegar', 'balsamic vinegar': 'balsamic_vinegar', 'celery': 'celery', 'kalamata olives': 'olives' }; const dbKey = ingredientMap[ingredientName] || null; if (dbKey) { console.log(` ✅ Mapped "${ingredientName}" → ${dbKey}`); } else { console.warn(` ❌ NO MAPPING for "${ingredientName}" (original: "${ingredientStr}")`); } return { quantity: quantity, unit: unit, ingredient: ingredientName, dbKey: dbKey, originalText: ingredientStr }; } // Calculate total ingredients needed for selected weekly meals using DYNAMIC quantities // Get portion multiplier based on meal frequency preference function getPortionMultiplier() { if (!profile || profile.mealsPerDay === 3) { return 1.0; // Standard portions for 3 meals/day } // 2 meals per day = larger portions if (profile.mealsPerDay === 2) { if (profile.mealTypes === 'breakfast_dinner') { // Breakfast gets 40%, dinner gets 50% of daily calories // So dinner portions are 1.43x normal (50% / 35% normal) return 1.5; // 50% larger portions overall } else if (profile.mealTypes === 'lunch_dinner') { // Lunch and dinner each get 45% of daily calories // Dinner normally gets 35%, so 45/35 = 1.29x return 1.4; // 40% larger portions overall } } return 1.0; } // ─── MEAL METHOD REHYDRATION ──────────────────────────────────── // Functions are stripped when objects round-trip through JSON.stringify // (saved to localStorage) and JSON.parse (loaded back). This walks // profile.weekPlan and re-attaches getIngredients() from the live // recipe DBs by meal key. // // Without this, the entire shopping cost system collapses to $0 // because calculateWeeklyIngredients can't call meal.getIngredients(). function rehydrateMealMethods() { if (!profile || !profile.weekPlan) return; const dbs = { breakfast: typeof breakfastRecipes !== 'undefined' ? breakfastRecipes : {}, lunch: typeof lunchRecipes !== 'undefined' ? lunchRecipes : {}, dinner: typeof recipes !== 'undefined' ? recipes : {}, snack: typeof snackOptions !== 'undefined' ? snackOptions : {} }; let rehydrated = 0; let missing = 0; profile.weekPlan.forEach(day => { ['breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner', 'snack'].forEach(slot => { const slotData = day[slot]; if (!slotData || !slotData.meal) return; const meal = slotData.meal; // Already has the function? Nothing to do. if (typeof meal.getIngredients === 'function') return; // Find the live recipe by key const key = meal.key; if (!key) { // Fallback: try to match by name const db = dbs[slot]; const liveEntry = Object.entries(db).find(([k, v]) => v.name === meal.name); if (liveEntry) { const [foundKey, liveRecipe] = liveEntry; meal.key = foundKey; if (typeof liveRecipe.getIngredients === 'function') { meal.getIngredients = liveRecipe.getIngredients; rehydrated++; return; } } missing++; return; } const liveRecipe = dbs[slot][key]; if (liveRecipe && typeof liveRecipe.getIngredients === 'function') { meal.getIngredients = liveRecipe.getIngredients; rehydrated++; } else { missing++; } }); }); if (rehydrated > 0 || missing > 0) { console.log('🔧 Rehydrated meal methods: ' + rehydrated + ' restored, ' + missing + ' missing'); } } function calculateWeeklyIngredients() { if (!profile || !profile.weekPlan) { console.warn('⚠️ No profile or weekPlan for shopping list'); return { ingredientsNeeded: {}, totalCost: 0, mealsSelected: 0 }; } // Defensive: ensure meal methods are attached. Idempotent — does nothing // if functions are already present. if (typeof rehydrateMealMethods === 'function') { rehydrateMealMethods(); } const ingredientsNeeded = {}; let mealsSelected = 0; let mealsWithoutIngredients = 0; console.log('=== CALCULATING WEEKLY INGREDIENTS FROM MEAL PLAN ==='); console.log(`Total days in plan: ${profile.weekPlan.length}`); // Process each day's meals from the generated week plan profile.weekPlan.forEach(day => { console.log(`\n📅 Day ${day.day}:`); // Breakfast if (day.breakfast && day.breakfast.meal) { const meal = day.breakfast.meal; console.log(` 🥐 Breakfast: ${meal.name}`); if (meal.getIngredients) { const ingredientsList = meal.getIngredients(day.breakfast.macros);
