console.log(` ✅ Found ${ingredientsList.length} ingredients`); aggregateIngredients(ingredientsNeeded, ingredientsList, 1); mealsSelected++; } else { console.warn(` ⚠️ No getIngredients() function for ${meal.name}`); mealsWithoutIngredients++; } } else { console.log(` 🥐 Breakfast: none`); } // Lunch if (day.lunch && day.lunch.meal) { const meal = day.lunch.meal; console.log(` 🥗 Lunch: ${meal.name}`); if (meal.getIngredients) { const ingredientsList = meal.getIngredients(day.lunch.macros); console.log(` ✅ Found ${ingredientsList.length} ingredients`); aggregateIngredients(ingredientsNeeded, ingredientsList, 1); mealsSelected++; } else { console.warn(` ⚠️ No getIngredients() function for ${meal.name}`); mealsWithoutIngredients++; } } else { console.log(` 🥗 Lunch: none`); } // Dinner if (day.dinner && day.dinner.meal) { const meal = day.dinner.meal; console.log(` 🍽️ Dinner: ${meal.name}`); if (meal.getIngredients) { const ingredientsList = meal.getIngredients(day.dinner.macros); console.log(` ✅ Found ${ingredientsList.length} ingredients`); aggregateIngredients(ingredientsNeeded, ingredientsList, 1); mealsSelected++; } else { console.warn(` ⚠️ No getIngredients() function for ${meal.name}`); mealsWithoutIngredients++; } } else { console.log(` 🍽️ Dinner: none`); } // Snack if (day.snack && day.snack.meal) { const meal = day.snack.meal; console.log(` 🍿 Snack: ${meal.name || 'snack'}`); if (meal.getIngredients) { const ingredientsList = meal.getIngredients(day.snack.macros); console.log(` ✅ Found ${ingredientsList.length} ingredients`); aggregateIngredients(ingredientsNeeded, ingredientsList, 1); mealsSelected++; } else if (meal.protein && meal.carbs && meal.fat) { // Snacks with direct macros (not recipes) - count but no ingredients console.log(` ℹ️ Snack with direct macros (no ingredients to add)`); mealsSelected++; } else { console.warn(` ⚠️ No getIngredients() function for ${meal.name || 'snack'}`); mealsWithoutIngredients++; } } else { console.log(` 🍿 Snack: none`); } }); console.log(`\n=== SUMMARY ===`); console.log(`📊 Total unique ingredients: ${Object.keys(ingredientsNeeded).length}`); console.log(`✅ Meals with ingredients: ${mealsSelected}`); console.log(`⚠️ Meals without getIngredients(): ${mealsWithoutIngredients}`); if (mealsWithoutIngredients > 0) { console.warn(`\n⚠️ WARNING: ${mealsWithoutIngredients} meals are missing getIngredients() functions!`); console.warn('This means the shopping list is incomplete. All recipes should have getIngredients().'); } // Don't calculate cost here - let generateShoppingList do it from ingredients return { ingredientsNeeded, totalCost: 0, // Will be calculated properly in generateShoppingList mealsSelected }; } /** * Helper: Aggregate ingredients from a recipe */ function aggregateIngredients(ingredientsNeeded, ingredientsList, multiplier = 1) { ingredientsList.forEach(ingredientStr => { const parsed = parseIngredientString(ingredientStr); if (parsed.dbKey && parsed.quantity > 0) { // Initialize if new if (!ingredientsNeeded[parsed.dbKey]) { ingredientsNeeded[parsed.dbKey] = { totalQty: 0, unit: parsed.unit, name: ingredientDatabase[parsed.dbKey]?.name || parsed.ingredient }; } // Convert units if needed let qtyToAdd = parsed.quantity * multiplier; if (parsed.unit === 'lb' && ingredientsNeeded[parsed.dbKey].unit === 'oz') { qtyToAdd = qtyToAdd * 16; // Convert lb to oz } else if (parsed.unit === 'oz' && ingredientsNeeded[parsed.dbKey].unit === 'lb') { qtyToAdd = qtyToAdd / 16; // Convert oz to lb } ingredientsNeeded[parsed.dbKey].totalQty += qtyToAdd; } }); } // Generate shopping list from needed ingredients function generateShoppingList() { const { ingredientsNeeded, totalCost, mealsSelected } = calculateWeeklyIngredients(); if (mealsSelected === 0) { return { items: [], totalCost: 0, mealsSelected: 0, byStore: {} }; } const shoppingList = []; let calculatedCost = 0; Object.entries(ingredientsNeeded).forEach(([dbKey, data]) => { const ingredient = ingredientDatabase[dbKey]; if (ingredient) { const quantityNeeded = data.totalQty; const recipeUnit = data.unit; const dbUnit = ingredient.unit; // Convert quantity to database units for cost calculation // CONVERSION FACTORS: divide quantityNeeded by factor to get package units // Example: "1 tbsp peanut butter" with factor 32 = 1/32 of a jar let convertedQty = quantityNeeded; const conversionKey = `${recipeUnit}->${dbUnit}`; const conversions = { // Same unit - no conversion 'lb->lb': 1, 'oz->oz': 1, 'cup->cup': 1, 'tbsp->tbsp': 1, 'tsp->tsp': 1, 'each->each': 1, 'can->can': 1, 'bottle->bottle': 1, 'jar->jar': 1, 'bag->bag': 1, 'box->box': 1, 'package->package': 1, 'container->container': 1, // Weight conversions 'oz->lb': 16, // 16 oz per lb 'lb->oz': 1/16, // 1 lb = 16 oz (reversed) // Volume → bottle (oils, sauces ~16oz bottle, ~32 tbsp) 'tbsp->bottle': 32, 'tsp->bottle': 96, 'cup->bottle': 4, // 32oz kefir bottle = 4 cups // Volume → jar (peanut butter, olives, spices) 'tbsp->jar': 32, // ~32 tbsp per jar 'tsp->jar': 96, // ~96 tsp per jar 'oz->jar': 10, // kalamata olives jar ~10oz // Volume → can 'oz->can': 15, // ~15 oz per can 'cup->can': 2, // crushed tomatoes 28oz can ≈ 2 cups // Volume → carton (broth) 'cup->carton': 4, // 32oz carton = 4 cups // Volume → bag (rice, oats, flour) 'cup->bag': 8, // ~8 cups per bag 'oz->bag': 16, // shredded cheese 8oz bag, carrots 32oz bag - use 16 avg // Volume → box (cereal, pasta) 'cup->box': 8, // ~8 cups per cereal box 'oz->box': 16, // ~16 oz per pasta box // Volume → container (yogurt, salsa) 'cup->container': 4, // 32oz container = 4 cups // Volume → package 'oz->package': 8, // feta 8oz package, parmesan ~8oz 'tbsp->package': 16, // parmesan ~16 tbsp per package 'each->package': 10, // tortillas ~10 per package 'slice->package': 10, // Weight → lb (when recipe calls for cups of dry grain) 'cup->lb': 2, // ~2 cups dry rice/oats per lb 'tbsp->lb': 32, // ~32 tbsp butter per lb // Individual units 'each->dozen': 12, // 12 eggs per dozen 'each->bunch': 6, // ~6 bananas per bunch 'each->bag': 4, // ~4 onions per bag // Cloves → bulb (garlic) 'clove->bulb': 10, 'cloves->bulb': 10, // Slice conversions (bread) 'slice->loaf': 16, // ~16 slices per loaf // Scoop → container (protein powder ~30 servings) 'scoop->container': 30, // Broccoli crown 'cup->crown': 2, // ~2 cups chopped per crown // oz → each (cucumbers ~6oz, tomatoes) 'oz->each': 6, // oz → pint (berries, cherry tomatoes) 'oz->pint': 10, 'cup->pint': 2, // 1 pint = 2 cups // oz → bunch (kale, celery, herbs) 'oz->bunch': 8, 'each->bunch_small': 1, // fallback // Misc fallbacks 'each->lb': 4, // avocados ~4 per lb 'each->crown': 1, // 1 broccoli crown = 1 each 'tbsp->container': 32, 'tsp->container': 96, 'tbsp->set': 100, // salt/pepper set lasts forever 'tsp->set': 300 }; const factor = conversions[conversionKey]; if (factor !== undefined) { convertedQty = quantityNeeded / factor; } else if (recipeUnit === dbUnit) { convertedQty = quantityNeeded; } else { // Safe fallback: assume recipe uses a small fraction of the package // This prevents charging full package price when conversion unknown convertedQty = quantityNeeded / 10; console.warn(`⚠️ No conversion for ${recipeUnit} → ${dbUnit} (${ingredient.name}), using 1/10 fallback`); } // WEEKLY COST = what the user actually spends per week on this ingredient. // A bottle of olive oil lasts 8 weeks but you buy 1 bottle. The weekly cost // is 1/8th the bottle price — the rest is amortized across future weeks. // // But there's a floor: if an item is in the plan, the user needs it NOW, // so minimum weekly cost = a small fraction of the package price (not zero). // // packagesToBuy: what shows on shopping list (always at least 1 for display) // weeklyCost: what counts toward weekly budget (uses fractional cost) const packagesToBuy = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(convertedQty)); // Weekly cost: if convertedQty < 1, user uses a fraction of a package per week // So the weekly cost is convertedQty × package_price (with a minimum to avoid // pennies that add nothing to the budget signal) let weeklyCost; if (convertedQty >= 1) { // Uses one or more full packages per week — charge full amount weeklyCost = packagesToBuy * ingredient.cost; } else { // Uses fraction of a package per week — charge fractional cost // Minimum 10% of package to reflect that something must be bought weeklyCost = Math.max(convertedQty, 0.1) * ingredient.cost; } const itemCost = weeklyCost; calculatedCost += itemCost; const item = { dbKey: dbKey, name: ingredient.name, quantityNeeded: parseFloat(quantityNeeded.toFixed(2)), unit: recipeUnit, baseQty: ingredient.baseQty, packagesToBuy: packagesToBuy, packageUnit: dbUnit, cost: parseFloat(itemCost.toFixed(2)), fullPackageCost: parseFloat((packagesToBuy * ingredient.cost).toFixed(2)), category: ingredient.category, bestStore: ingredient.bestStore, altStore: ingredient.altStore }; shoppingList.push(item); } }); // Sort by category for easier shopping const categoryOrder = { protein: 1, produce: 2, grain: 3, canned: 4, sauce: 5, oil: 6, nuts: 7, staple: 8, supplement: 9 }; shoppingList.sort((a, b) => (categoryOrder[a.category] || 9) - (categoryOrder[b.category] || 9)); // Compute full-package total (what you pay at checkout if buying everything new) const fullPackageTotal = shoppingList.reduce((sum, it) => sum + (it.fullPackageCost || it.cost), 0); // Group items by user's selected stores const byStore = groupItemsBySelectedStores(shoppingList); return { items: shoppingList, dinnerCost: parseFloat(calculatedCost.toFixed(2)), breakfastCost: 0, totalCost: parseFloat(calculatedCost.toFixed(2)), // Weekly amortized cost fullPackageTotal: parseFloat(fullPackageTotal.toFixed(2)), // Checkout total mealsSelected: mealsSelected, byStore: byStore }; } // Group shopping items by user's selected stores function groupItemsBySelectedStores(items) { // Store name + emoji mapping (shared by all paths in this function) const storeDisplayNames = { aldi: 'Aldi', walmart: 'Walmart', costco: 'Costco', traderjoes: 'Trader Joe\'s', heb: 'HEB', target: 'Target', sams: 'Sam\'s Club', kroger: 'Kroger', wholefood: 'Whole Foods', amazonfresh: 'Amazon Fresh', specialty: 'Specialty Store' }; const storeEmojis = { aldi: '🥇', walmart: '🏪', costco: '🏬', traderjoes: '🛒', heb: '🌟', target: '🎯', sams: '📦', kroger: '🛍️', wholefood: '🥬', amazonfresh: '📦', specialty: '🌟' }; // FALLBACK: user hasn't picked any stores during onboarding. // Auto-group by each item's bestStore so "Group by Store" still works // out of the box. The previous fallback returned an array shape that // crashed the renderer (which expects { name, emoji, items, totalCost }). if (!profile || !profile.selectedStores || profile.selectedStores.length === 0) { const groups = {}; items.forEach(item => { const store = item.bestStore || 'specialty'; if (!groups[store]) { groups[store] = { name: storeDisplayNames[store] || store, emoji: storeEmojis[store] || '🏪', items: [], totalCost: 0 }; } groups[store].items.push(item); groups[store].totalCost += parseFloat(item.cost) || 0; }); Object.keys(groups).forEach(store => { groups[store].totalCost = groups[store].totalCost.toFixed(2); }); return groups; } // Initialize store groups const groups = {}; profile.selectedStores.forEach(store => { groups[store] = { name: storeDisplayNames[store] || store, emoji: storeEmojis[store] || '🏪', items: [], totalCost: 0 }; }); // Assign each item to best available store items.forEach(item => { let assignedStore = null; // Check if best store is in selected stores if (profile.selectedStores.includes(item.bestStore)) { assignedStore = item.bestStore; } // Check if alt store is in selected stores else if (profile.selectedStores.includes(item.altStore)) { assignedStore = item.altStore; } // Fallback to first selected store else { assignedStore = profile.selectedStores[0]; } groups[assignedStore].items.push(item); groups[assignedStore].totalCost += parseFloat(item.cost); }); // Round totals Object.keys(groups).forEach(store => { groups[store].totalCost = groups[store].totalCost.toFixed(2); }); return groups; } // INTELLIGENT STORE RECOMMENDATIONS // Analyzes shopping list and recommends optimal stores for maximum savings function analyzeStoreRecommendations(shoppingData) { if (!shoppingData || shoppingData.mealsSelected === 0) return null; // Define comprehensive store pricing profiles based on 2026 market research const storePrices = { aldi: { name: 'Aldi', emoji: '🥇', color: '#e76f51', discountsByCategory: { protein: 0.30, // 30% cheaper on proteins produce: 0.25, // 25% cheaper on produce canned: 0.35, // 35% cheaper on canned goods grain: 0.15 }, // Specific items that are best at Aldi (based on research) bestItems: { chicken_breast: 0.30, // $1.99/lb vs $2.79 avg = 29% savings ground_turkey: 0.28, // $2.75/lb vs $3.25 avg = 15% but even better fresh eggs: 0.27, // $2.19 vs $2.99 = 27% savings ground_beef: 0.20, // Best prices on ground beef broccoli: 0.25, carrots: 0.30, onions: 0.20, bell_peppers: 0.20, chickpeas_canned: 0.40, // Huge savings on canned goods black_beans: 0.30, white_beans: 0.35, pinto_beans: 0.35 } }, walmart: { name: 'Walmart', emoji: '🥈', color: '#0891b2', discountsByCategory: { grain: 0.20, // 20% cheaper on grains/pantry canned: 0.25, // 25% cheaper on canned staple: 0.15 }, bestItems: { brown_rice: 0.24, // $1.05/lb - best rice prices bread: 0.15, crushed_tomatoes: 0.30, tomatoes_canned: 0.30, lentils_dry: 0.29, // 29% savings on lentils oats: 0.15, pasta_chickpea: 0.10, chicken_broth: 0.15, vegetable_broth: 0.15 } }, costco: { name: 'Costco', emoji: '🥉', color: '#95E1D3', discountsByCategory: { protein: 0.20, // 20% cheaper on bulk proteins oil: 0.25 // 25% cheaper on oils/nuts }, bestItems: { eggs: 0.23, // $2.94/dozen in bulk (60-count) chicken_breast: 0.15, // Decent bulk pricing olive_oil: 0.20, peanut_butter: 0.25, nuts: 0.30 }, requiresBulk: true, note: 'Best for bulk purchases - requires membership' } }; // Analyze current shopping list const recommendations = { currentTotal: parseFloat(shoppingData.totalCost), currentStore1: parseFloat(shoppingData.store1Total), currentStore2: parseFloat(shoppingData.store2Total), store1Name: profile.store1Name || 'Store 1', store2Name: profile.store2Name || 'Store 2', suggestions: [], categoryBreakdown: {} }; // Calculate potential savings per store with detailed tracking const storeAnalysis = { aldi: { items: [], savings: 0, categories: {} }, walmart: { items: [], savings: 0, categories: {} }, costco: { items: [], savings: 0, categories: {} } }; shoppingData.items.forEach(item => { const itemCost = parseFloat(item.cost); const ingredient = ingredientDatabase[item.dbKey]; if (!ingredient) return; const category = ingredient.category; // Check each store for potential savings Object.keys(storePrices).forEach(storeKey => { const store = storePrices[storeKey]; let discountRate = 0; // Check for specific item discount if (store.bestItems && store.bestItems[item.dbKey]) { discountRate = store.bestItems[item.dbKey]; } // Otherwise check category discount else if (store.discountsByCategory && store.discountsByCategory[category]) { discountRate = store.discountsByCategory[category]; } if (discountRate > 0) { const potentialSavings = itemCost * discountRate; storeAnalysis[storeKey].savings += potentialSavings; storeAnalysis[storeKey].items.push({ name: item.name, dbKey: item.dbKey, savings: potentialSavings, discountRate: discountRate, category: category }); // Track by category if (!storeAnalysis[storeKey].categories[category]) { storeAnalysis[storeKey].categories[category] = { items: 0, savings: 0 }; } storeAnalysis[storeKey].categories[category].items++; storeAnalysis[storeKey].categories[category].savings += potentialSavings; } }); }); // Create recommendations based on savings potential (minimum $2 threshold) Object.keys(storeAnalysis).forEach((storeKey, index) => { const analysis = storeAnalysis[storeKey]; const store = storePrices[storeKey]; if (analysis.savings >= 2) { // Find top categories const topCategories = Object.entries(analysis.categories) .sort((a, b) => b[1].savings - a[1].savings) .slice(0, 2) .map(([cat, data]) => `${cat} (${data.items} items)`); // Find top items const topItems = analysis.items .sort((a, b) => b.savings - a.savings) .slice(0, 4) .map(i => i.name); recommendations.suggestions.push({ store: store.name, emoji: store.emoji, color: store.color, itemCount: analysis.items.length, savings: analysis.savings.toFixed(2), savingsPercent: ((analysis.savings / recommendations.currentTotal) * 100).toFixed(0), topItems: topItems, topCategories: topCategories, priority: index + 1, note: store.note }); } }); // Calculate total potential savings const totalSavings = Object.values(storeAnalysis).reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.savings, 0); recommendations.totalPotentialSavings = totalSavings.toFixed(2); recommendations.percentSavings = ((totalSavings / recommendations.currentTotal) * 100).toFixed(0); recommendations.optimizedTotal = (recommendations.currentTotal - totalSavings).toFixed(2); // Sort by savings amount (descending) recommendations.suggestions.sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.savings) - parseFloat(a.savings)); return recommendations; } function renderStoreRecommendations() { const shoppingData = state.dynamicShoppingList || generateShoppingList(); if (!shoppingData || shoppingData.mealsSelected === 0) { document.getElementById('store-recommendations').innerHTML = ''; return; } const recommendations = analyzeStoreRecommendations(shoppingData); if (!recommendations || recommendations.suggestions.length === 0) { document.getElementById('store-recommendations').innerHTML = ''; return; } let html = `
💡 Smart Shopping Strategy
Save $${recommendations.totalPotentialSavings}
Current Cost: $${recommendations.currentTotal} → Optimized: $${recommendations.optimizedTotal}
Shop strategically at multiple stores to save ${recommendations.percentSavings}% on your weekly groceries!
`; recommendations.suggestions.forEach((suggestion, index) => { html += `
${suggestion.emoji} ${suggestion.store}
-$${suggestion.savings}
${suggestion.savingsPercent}%
${suggestion.itemCount} items • Best categories: ${suggestion.topCategories.join(', ')}
Top deals: ${suggestion.topItems.join(', ')}
${suggestion.note ? `
💡 ${suggestion.note}
` : ''}
`; }); html += `
💡 Prices based on 2026 market research across ${recommendations.suggestions.length} retailers
`; document.getElementById('store-recommendations').innerHTML = html; } // Select recipe for a specific day function selectMealForDay(day, recipeKey) { state.weeklyMeals[`day${day}`] = recipeKey; state.dynamicShoppingList = generateShoppingList(); saveState(); if (typeof renderMealPlanner === 'function') renderMealPlanner(); if (typeof renderDynamicShopping === 'function') renderDynamicShopping(); if (typeof renderBudgetTracker === 'function') renderBudgetTracker(); } // Auto-populate week with rotation based on preferences function autoFillWeek() { const filtered = getFilteredRecipes(); if (filtered.length === 0) { alert('No recipes match your dietary preferences and allergen restrictions!'); return; } // Get user's budget and determine which recipes to prioritize const weeklyBudget = profile ? profile.weeklyBudget : 150; // Estimate cost per meal based on budget (minus breakfast ~$35) const budgetForDinners = weeklyBudget - 35; // Reserve for breakfast const budgetPerMeal = budgetForDinners / 7; console.log('=== AUTO-FILL BUDGET ANALYSIS ==='); console.log('Weekly budget:', weeklyBudget); console.log('Budget for dinners:', budgetForDinners); console.log('Budget per meal:', budgetPerMeal.toFixed(2)); // Filter recipes by budget tier let budgetFilteredRecipes = filtered; if (budgetPerMeal < 8) { // Very tight budget - use only budget tier recipes console.log('Budget tier: BUDGET ONLY (< $8/meal)'); budgetFilteredRecipes = filtered.filter(([key]) => { const recipeData = recipeIngredients[key]; return recipeData && recipeData.tier === 'budget'; }); if (budgetFilteredRecipes.length === 0) { console.log('WARNING: No budget recipes available, using all'); budgetFilteredRecipes = filtered; } } else if (budgetPerMeal < 12) { // Moderate budget - prefer budget and medium tier (NO PREMIUM) console.log('Budget tier: BUDGET + MEDIUM (< $12/meal, exclude premium)'); const affordableRecipes = filtered.filter(([key]) => { const recipeData = recipeIngredients[key]; return recipeData && (recipeData.tier === 'budget' || recipeData.tier === 'medium'); }); budgetFilteredRecipes = affordableRecipes.length > 0 ? affordableRecipes : filtered; console.log('Affordable recipes found:', affordableRecipes.length); } else if (budgetPerMeal < 15) { // Comfortable budget - budget + medium (still NO PREMIUM unless high budget) console.log('Budget tier: BUDGET + MEDIUM (< $15/meal, exclude premium)'); const affordableRecipes = filtered.filter(([key]) => { const recipeData = recipeIngredients[key]; return recipeData && (recipeData.tier === 'budget' || recipeData.tier === 'medium'); }); budgetFilteredRecipes = affordableRecipes.length > 0 ? affordableRecipes : filtered; } else { // High budget - allow all recipes including premium console.log('Budget tier: ALL RECIPES including premium (>= $15/meal)'); } console.log('Recipes after budget filter:', budgetFilteredRecipes.length); // Smart distribution algorithm - spaces out cuisines const weeklySelection = distributeRecipesByCuisine(budgetFilteredRecipes, 7); console.log('Selected recipes for week:', weeklySelection); for (let day = 1; day <= 7; day++) { state.weeklyMeals[`day${day}`] = weeklySelection[day - 1]; } state.dynamicShoppingList = generateShoppingList(); saveState(); if (typeof renderMealPlanner === 'function') renderMealPlanner(); if (typeof renderDynamicShopping === 'function') renderDynamicShopping(); if (typeof renderBudgetTracker === 'function') renderBudgetTracker(); } // Smart cuisine distribution algorithm function distributeRecipesByCuisine(filteredRecipes, numDays) { // Group recipes by cuisine const cuisineGroups = {}; filteredRecipes.forEach(([key, recipe]) => { const cuisine = recipe.cuisine || 'other'; if (!cuisineGroups[cuisine]) { cuisineGroups[cuisine] = []; } cuisineGroups[cuisine].push(key); }); const cuisines = Object.keys(cuisineGroups); const result = []; // If we have 7+ different cuisines, perfect! One per day if (cuisines.length >= numDays) { // Shuffle cuisines for variety const shuffled = shuffleArray([...cuisines]); for (let i = 0; i < numDays; i++) { const cuisine = shuffled[i]; const recipeKey = cuisineGroups[cuisine][0]; result.push(recipeKey); } return result; } // Otherwise, distribute cuisines as evenly as possible // Calculate spacing interval const interval = Math.floor(numDays / cuisines.length); // Create a week schedule initialized with nulls const schedule = new Array(numDays).fill(null); // Place cuisines at even intervals let cuisineIndex = 0; for (let position = 0; position < numDays; position += interval) { if (cuisineIndex < cuisines.length && position < numDays) { const cuisine = cuisines[cuisineIndex]; const recipes = cuisineGroups[cuisine]; // Rotate through recipes in this cuisine const recipeIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * recipes.length); schedule[position] = recipes[recipeIndex]; cuisineIndex++; } } // Fill remaining null slots with unused cuisines, avoiding back-to-back for (let i = 0; i < numDays; i++) { if (schedule[i] === null) { // Find a cuisine that's not adjacent const prevCuisine = i > 0 && schedule[i-1] ? filteredRecipes.find(([k]) => k === schedule[i-1])[1].cuisine : null; const nextCuisine = i < numDays - 1 && schedule[i+1] ? filteredRecipes.find(([k]) => k === schedule[i+1])[1].cuisine : null; // Find cuisines that aren't adjacent const availableCuisines = cuisines.filter(c => c !== prevCuisine && c !== nextCuisine ); if (availableCuisines.length > 0) { const randomCuisine = availableCuisines[Math.floor(Math.random() * availableCuisines.length)]; const recipes = cuisineGroups[randomCuisine]; schedule[i] = recipes[Math.floor(Math.random() * recipes.length)]; } else { // Fallback: just pick any cuisine const randomCuisine = cuisines[Math.floor(Math.random() * cuisines.length)]; const recipes = cuisineGroups[randomCuisine]; schedule[i] = recipes[Math.floor(Math.random() * recipes.length)]; } } } return schedule; } // Helper: Shuffle array function shuffleArray(array) { const shuffled = [...array]; for (let i = shuffled.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [shuffled[i], shuffled[j]] = [shuffled[j], shuffled[i]]; } return shuffled; } // Clear all weekly meals function clearWeeklyMeals() { for (let day = 1; day <= 7; day++) { state.weeklyMeals[`day${day}`] = null; } state.dynamicShoppingList = null; saveState(); if (typeof renderMealPlanner === 'function') renderMealPlanner(); if (typeof renderDynamicShopping === 'function') renderDynamicShopping(); if (typeof renderBudgetTracker === 'function') renderBudgetTracker(); } // DEBUG: Check what's in weekly meals function debugWeeklyMeals() { console.log('=== WEEKLY MEALS DEBUG ==='); console.log('state.weeklyMeals:', state.weeklyMeals); for (let day = 1; day <= 7; day++) { const recipeKey = state.weeklyMeals[`day${day}`]; console.log(`Day ${day}: ${recipeKey || 'null'} ${recipeKey && recipes[recipeKey] ? '(' + recipes[recipeKey].name + ')' : ''}`); } // Test shopping list generation const shoppingData = generateShoppingList(); console.log('Meals selected:', shoppingData.mealsSelected); console.log('Total items:', shoppingData.items.length); console.log('Shopping list items:', shoppingData.items); return shoppingData; } // Make debug function available in console window.debugWeeklyMeals = debugWeeklyMeals; // Get recipes by budget tier function getRecipesByTier(tier) { return Object.entries(recipeIngredients) .filter(([key, recipe]) => recipe.tier === tier) .map(([key, recipe]) => ({ key, ...recipe })); } // Optimize for budget (suggest swaps) function suggestBudgetSwaps(targetBudget) { const shoppingData = generateShoppingList(); const totalCost = parseFloat(shoppingData.totalCost); const mealsSelected = shoppingData.mealsSelected; if (totalCost <= targetBudget || mealsSelected === 0) { return []; } const overAmount = totalCost - targetBudget; const suggestions = []; // PRIORITY 1: Suggest cheaper meal swaps const budgetRecipes = getRecipesByTier('budget'); let potentialSavingsFromSwaps = 0; const swapSuggestions = []; for (let day = 1; day <= 7; day++) { const recipeKey = state.weeklyMeals[`day${day}`]; if (recipeKey && recipeIngredients[recipeKey]) { const recipe = recipeIngredients[recipeKey]; // Suggest swap if not already budget tier and costs more than $4 if (recipe.tier !== 'budget' && recipe.costPerServing > 4) { // Find matching diet type budget alternative const matchingBudgetRecipes = budgetRecipes.filter(alt => { const altRecipe = recipes[alt.key]; const currentRecipe = recipes[recipeKey]; return altRecipe && currentRecipe && altRecipe.dietType === currentRecipe.dietType; }); const alternative = matchingBudgetRecipes.length > 0 ? matchingBudgetRecipes[Math.floor(Math.random() * matchingBudgetRecipes.length)] : budgetRecipes[0]; if (alternative) { const savings = recipe.costPerServing - alternative.costPerServing; potentialSavingsFromSwaps += savings; swapSuggestions.push({ type: 'swap_meal', priority: 1, day: day, current: recipe.name, currentCost: recipe.costPerServing.toFixed(2), alternative: alternative.name, alternativeCost: alternative.costPerServing.toFixed(2), savings: savings.toFixed(2) }); } } } } // If swaps solve the problem, return only swaps if (potentialSavingsFromSwaps >= overAmount) { // Return only enough swaps to get under budget let cumulativeSavings = 0; const neededSwaps = []; for (const swap of swapSuggestions) { neededSwaps.push(swap); cumulativeSavings += parseFloat(swap.savings); if (cumulativeSavings >= overAmount) break; } return neededSwaps; } // Add all swap suggestions suggestions.push(...swapSuggestions); // Calculate remaining over amount after all swaps const remainingOver = overAmount - potentialSavingsFromSwaps; // PRIORITY 2: Suggest reducing to 2 meals/day (if currently 3) if (remainingOver > 0 && profile && profile.mealsPerDay === 3) { const twoMealSavings = totalCost * 0.18; // ~18% savings suggestions.push({ type: 'reduce_meals', priority: 2, message: 'Switch to 2 larger meals per day instead of 3', explanation: 'Eating 2 meals (like breakfast + dinner or lunch + dinner) can save money while keeping you satisfied with larger portions.', savings: twoMealSavings.toFixed(2), action: 'Change in profile settings', icon: '🍽️' }); // If this would solve it, stop here if (potentialSavingsFromSwaps + twoMealSavings >= overAmount) { return suggestions; } } // PRIORITY 3: Suggest eliminating snacks if (remainingOver > 0) { const snackSavings = 25; // Estimated $25/week on snacks suggestions.push({ type: 'eliminate_snacks', priority: 3, message: 'Consider eliminating evening snacks', explanation: 'Snacks add roughly $25/week to your grocery bill. Slightly larger meals can help you stay satisfied without snacking.', savings: snackSavings.toFixed(2), action: 'Optional - skip snack items when shopping', icon: '🚫' }); } return suggestions; } // Track whether we've already shown the quota-exceeded warning this session // to avoid spamming the user with toasts on every save attempt. let _quotaWarningShown = false; // Wrapper for localStorage.setItem that handles quota-exceeded gracefully. // Returns true on success, false on failure. function safeLocalStorageSet(key, value) { try { localStorage.setItem(key, value); return true; } catch (e) { // Most likely cause: QuotaExceededError (5-10 MB localStorage limit hit). // Don't crash — alert user once per session and continue working in-memory. console.error('localStorage write failed for key "' + key + '":', e); if (!_quotaWarningShown) { _quotaWarningShown = true; if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') { showLogToast('Storage full — export your data via Settings'); } } return false; } } function saveState() { safeLocalStorageSet('tracker-state', JSON.stringify(state)); updateStats(); } function resetAllData() { if (confirm('Reset all data? This cannot be undone.')) { localStorage.removeItem('tracker-state'); localStorage.removeItem('user-profile'); location.reload(); } } // Cuisine checkbox styling document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { // Meal frequency selection toggle document.querySelectorAll('input[name="mealsPerDay"]').forEach(radio => { radio.addEventListener('change', function() { const mealTypeSelection = document.getElementById('mealTypeSelection'); if (this.value === '2') { mealTypeSelection.style.display = 'block'; } else { mealTypeSelection.style.display = 'none'; } }); }); document.querySelectorAll('.cuisine-option input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(cb => { cb.addEventListener('change', function() { if (this.checked) { this.closest('.cuisine-option').classList.add('selected'); } else { this.closest('.cuisine-option').classList.remove('selected'); } }); }); document.querySelectorAll('.radio-option input[type="radio"]').forEach(radio => { radio.addEventListener('change', function() { const group = this.name; document.querySelectorAll(`.radio-option input[name="${group}"]`).forEach(r => { r.closest('.radio-option').classList.remove('selected'); }); if (this.checked) { this.closest('.radio-option').classList.add('selected'); } }); }); }); // Initialize window.addEventListener('load', () => { // FORCE CHECK AND CLEAR OLD PROFILES const saved = localStorage.getItem('user-profile'); if (saved) { try { const oldProfile = JSON.parse(saved); // Check if it has old structure if (!oldProfile.weekPlan || oldProfile.defaultBreakfast || oldProfile.favoriteLunches) { console.log('🔄 Old profile schema detected - removing only the bad profile key'); // Targeted removal — preserves food diary, exercise log, photos, theme, etc. localStorage.removeItem('user-profile'); window.location.reload(); return; } } catch (e) { console.error('Error checking profile:', e); localStorage.removeItem('user-profile'); window.location.reload(); return; } } // Ensure form fields have default values on page load if (!document.getElementById('heightFeet').value) { document.getElementById('heightFeet').value = 5; } if (!document.getElementById('heightInches').value) { document.getElementById('heightInches').value = 8; } if (!document.getElementById('userAge').value) { document.getElementById('userAge').value = 30; } if (!document.getElementById('userWeight').value) { document.getElementById('userWeight').value = 170; } checkProfile(); initFoodDiary(); initExerciseLog(); initFastingSystem(); initProgressPhotos(); initCustomFoods(); // Initialize Sprint 2: notifications scheduler if previously granted if (typeof ensureNotificationState === 'function') { ensureNotificationState(); if (typeof Notification !== 'undefined' && Notification.permission === 'granted' && state.notifications.enabled) { if (typeof startNotificationScheduler === 'function') startNotificationScheduler(); console.log('🔔 Notification scheduler started'); } } // Populate water tab if profile exists if (profile && profile.waterOz) { console.log('💧 Initializing hydration schedule...'); renderHydrationSchedule(); } // DEBUG: Test if populateBreakfastGrid works setTimeout(() => { console.log('🧪 Testing populateBreakfastGrid...'); if (typeof populateBreakfastGrid === 'function') { console.log('✅ populateBreakfastGrid function exists'); populateBreakfastGrid(); } else { console.error('❌ populateBreakfastGrid function NOT FOUND'); } }, 2000); // Auto-fill weekly meal planner if empty (first-time user experience) setTimeout(() => { if (profile) { // Check if any day has an actual recipe assigned let hasAnyRecipes = false; if (state.weeklyMeals) { Object.values(state.weeklyMeals).forEach(recipeId => { if (recipeId) hasAnyRecipes = true; }); } if (!hasAnyRecipes) { console.log('No recipes in weekly plan - auto-clicking Auto-Fill button'); // Programmatically click the Auto-Fill Week button const autoFillBtn = document.querySelector('button[onclick="autoFillWeek()"]'); if (autoFillBtn) { autoFillBtn.click(); } } } // P2 #10: Auto-popup weekly review on Sunday evenings. // Apple Year-in-Review pattern — surface the recap unprompted, but // only once per week. Show after 5pm Sunday only, and only if the // user has logged at least 4 days this week (so there's something // worth reviewing). if (typeof checkAutoWeeklyReview === 'function') { setTimeout(checkAutoWeeklyReview, 1500); } }, 1000); // Increased delay to ensure DOM is ready }); // ======================================== // PROGRESSIVE WEB APP (PWA) // ======================================== /** * Register service worker for offline support */ if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) { window.addEventListener('load', () => { registerServiceWorker(); }); } async function registerServiceWorker() { try { // Create inline service worker const swCode = ` const CACHE_NAME = 'sorrel-v1.5.3'; const urlsToCache = [ '/', '/index.html' ]; self.addEventListener('install', event => { event.waitUntil( caches.open(CACHE_NAME) .then(cache => cache.addAll(urlsToCache)) ); }); self.addEventListener('fetch', event => { event.respondWith( caches.match(event.request) .then(response => response || fetch(event.request)) ); }); self.addEventListener('activate', event => { event.waitUntil( caches.keys().then(cacheNames => { return Promise.all( cacheNames.map(cacheName => { if (cacheName !== CACHE_NAME) { return caches.delete(cacheName); } }) ); }) ); }); `; const blob = new Blob([swCode], { type: 'application/javascript' }); const swUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const registration = await navigator.serviceWorker.register(swUrl); console.log('✅ Service Worker registered:', registration); // Show install prompt when available setupInstallPrompt(); } catch (error) { console.log('Service Worker registration failed:', error); } } /** * Setup PWA install prompt */ let deferredPrompt; function setupInstallPrompt() { window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); deferredPrompt = e; // Show custom install button showInstallButton(); }); window.addEventListener('appinstalled', () => { console.log('✅ PWA installed!'); deferredPrompt = null; hideInstallButton(); }); } /** * Show install button */ function showInstallButton() { // Check if button already exists if (document.getElementById('pwa-install-btn')) return; const button = document.createElement('button'); button.id = 'pwa-install-btn'; button.innerHTML = '📱 Install App'; button.style.cssText = ` position: fixed; bottom: 80px; right: 20px; background: var(--accent-gradient); color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 25px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(10, 125, 90, 0.4); z-index: 1000; animation: pulse 2s infinite; `; button.onclick = installPWA; document.body.appendChild(button); // Add pulse animation if (!document.getElementById('pwa-animation-style')) { const style = document.createElement('style'); style.id = 'pwa-animation-style'; style.textContent = ` @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.05); } } `; document.head.appendChild(style); } } /** * Hide install button */ function hideInstallButton() { const button = document.getElementById('pwa-install-btn'); if (button) button.remove(); } /** * Trigger PWA install */ async function installPWA() { if (!deferredPrompt) { alert('App is already installed or install is not available on this device.'); return; } deferredPrompt.prompt(); const { outcome } = await deferredPrompt.userChoice; if (outcome === 'accepted') { console.log('✅ User accepted PWA install'); } else { console.log('❌ User dismissed PWA install'); } deferredPrompt = null; hideInstallButton(); } /** * Check if running as installed PWA */ function isInstalledPWA() { return window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)').matches || window.navigator.standalone === true; } /** * Display PWA status */ function displayPWAStatus() { const installed = isInstalledPWA(); const offline = !navigator.onLine; return `
${installed ? '✅ App Installed' : '📱 Install Available'}
${installed ? 'Running as installed app with offline support' : 'Install this app for offline access and faster loading'}
${!installed ? ` ` : ''}
${offline ? '📵 Offline Mode' : '🌐 Online'}
${offline ? 'Working offline - some features limited' : 'All features available'}
`; } // Monitor online/offline status window.addEventListener('online', () => { console.log('✅ Back online'); if (typeof renderSettings === 'function') renderSettings(); }); window.addEventListener('offline', () => { console.log('📵 Gone offline'); if (typeof renderSettings === 'function') renderSettings(); }); // ======================================== // FEATURE 13: BARCODE SCANNER // ======================================== let barcodeScanner = null; let currentScanMeal = null; /** * Open barcode scanner */ function openBarcodeScanner(mealId) { // Infer meal from time of day when no explicit slot passed (matches AI photo + Voice). // This means a 7pm FAB tap routes to dinner, not breakfast. if (!mealId) { const h = new Date().getHours(); if (h < 11) mealId = 'm0'; // breakfast else if (h < 15) mealId = 'm1'; // lunch else if (h < 21) mealId = 'm2'; // dinner else mealId = 'm3'; // snacks } // Check if Quagga is loaded if (typeof Quagga === 'undefined') { alert('❌ Barcode scanner library not loaded. Please refresh the page or use manual entry.'); return; } currentScanMeal = mealId; document.getElementById('barcodeScannerModal').style.display = 'flex'; document.getElementById('barcode-status').textContent = 'Initializing camera...'; // Initialize Quagga scanner initializeBarcodeScanner(); } /** * Close barcode scanner */ function closeBarcodeScanner() { if (typeof Quagga !== 'undefined' && barcodeScanner) { try { Quagga.stop(); } catch (e) { console.error('Error stopping Quagga:', e); } barcodeScanner = null; } document.getElementById('barcodeScannerModal').style.display = 'none'; } /** * Initialize Quagga barcode scanner */ function initializeBarcodeScanner() { if (typeof Quagga === 'undefined') { document.getElementById('barcode-status').textContent = '❌ Scanner library not loaded. Please refresh the page.'; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.background = '#f8d7da'; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.color = '#721c24'; return; } Quagga.init({ inputStream: { name: "Live", type: "LiveStream", target: document.querySelector('#barcode-video'), constraints: { facingMode: "environment" // Use back camera on mobile } }, decoder: { readers: [ "ean_reader", // EAN-13, EAN-8 "upc_reader", // UPC-A, UPC-E "code_128_reader", "code_39_reader" ] } }, function(err) { if (err) { console.error('Barcode scanner error:', err); document.getElementById('barcode-status').textContent = '❌ Camera access denied. Please allow camera permission or enter barcode manually.'; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.background = '#f8d7da'; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.color = '#721c24'; return; } console.log("✅ Barcode scanner initialized"); document.getElementById('barcode-status').textContent = '📷 Point camera at barcode...'; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.background = '#d4edda'; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.color = '#155724'; Quagga.start(); // Set up detection listener Quagga.onDetected(onBarcodeDetected); }); } /** * Handle barcode detection */ function onBarcodeDetected(result) { const code = result.codeResult.code; console.log('Barcode detected:', code); document.getElementById('barcode-status').textContent = `✅ Scanned: ${code} - Looking up...`; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.background = '#d4edda'; // Stop scanner Quagga.stop(); // Lookup product lookupBarcode(code); } /** * Lookup barcode in OpenFoodFacts database */ async function lookupBarcode(barcode) { try { const response = await fetch(`https://world.openfoodfacts.org/api/v0/product/${barcode}.json`); const data = await response.json(); if (data.status === 1 && data.product) { const product = data.product; // Extract nutrition info (per 100g) const nutrition = { name: product.product_name || 'Unknown Product', calories: parseFloat(product.nutriments['energy-kcal_100g']) || 0, protein: parseFloat(product.nutriments.proteins_100g) || 0, carbs: parseFloat(product.nutriments.carbohydrates_100g) || 0, fat: parseFloat(product.nutriments.fat_100g) || 0, servingSize: product.serving_size || '100g', brand: product.brands || '' }; document.getElementById('barcode-status').innerHTML = `
✅ Found: ${nutrition.name}
${nutrition.brand ? nutrition.brand + ' • ' : ''}${nutrition.calories} cal per 100g
`; // Add to food database if not exists const foodId = 'scanned_' + barcode; if (!foodDatabase[foodId]) { foodDatabase[foodId] = { name: nutrition.name, category: 'Scanned Foods', servings: [{ name: product.serving_size || '100g', protein: nutrition.protein, carbs: nutrition.carbs, fat: nutrition.fat }] }; } // Auto-add to current meal after 2 seconds setTimeout(() => { closeBarcodeScanner(); addFoodToMealDirect(currentScanMeal, foodId, 0, 1); alert(`✅ ${nutrition.name} added to your meal!`); }, 2000); } else { document.getElementById('barcode-status').innerHTML = `
❌ Product not found in database.
Try entering it manually below.
`; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.background = '#f8d7da'; } } catch (error) { console.error('Barcode lookup error:', error); document.getElementById('barcode-status').textContent = '❌ Error looking up product. Please try again.'; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.background = '#f8d7da'; } } /** * Manual barcode lookup */ function lookupManualBarcode() { const barcode = document.getElementById('manual-barcode-input').value.trim(); if (!barcode) { alert('Please enter a barcode'); return; } if (!/^\d+$/.test(barcode)) { alert('Please enter numbers only'); return; } document.getElementById('barcode-status').textContent = `Looking up ${barcode}...`; document.getElementById('barcode-status').style.background = '#fef3c7'; lookupBarcode(barcode); } // ======================================== // FEATURE 14: FOOD IMAGE RECOGNITION // ======================================== let mobilenetModel = null; let imageRecognitionStream = null; /** * Load MobileNet model */ async function loadMobileNetModel() { if (mobilenetModel) return mobilenetModel; // Check if mobilenet library is loaded if (typeof mobilenet === 'undefined') { console.error('MobileNet library not loaded'); return null; } try { console.log('Loading MobileNet model...'); mobilenetModel = await mobilenet.load(); console.log('✅ MobileNet model loaded'); return mobilenetModel; } catch (error) { console.error('Error loading model:', error); return null; } } /** * Open image recognition modal */ function openImageRecognition(mealId = 'm0') { // Check if TensorFlow and MobileNet are loaded if (typeof tf === 'undefined' || typeof mobilenet === 'undefined') { alert('❌ AI recognition library not loaded. Please refresh the page or use manual entry.'); return; } currentScanMeal = mealId; document.getElementById('imageRecognitionModal').style.display = 'flex'; document.getElementById('image-recognition-status').textContent = 'Choose an option above to get started'; // Hide all preview elements document.getElementById('food-image-preview').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('food-camera-container').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('food-recognition-results').style.display = 'none'; // Preload model loadMobileNetModel(); } /** * Close image recognition */ function closeImageRecognition() { if (imageRecognitionStream) { imageRecognitionStream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop()); imageRecognitionStream = null; } document.getElementById('imageRecognitionModal').style.display = 'none'; } /** * Capture photo with camera */ async function capturePhoto() { try { const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: { facingMode: "environment" } }); imageRecognitionStream = stream; const video = document.getElementById('food-camera-video'); video.srcObject = stream; document.getElementById('food-camera-container').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('image-recognition-status').textContent = 'Position your food in the frame and tap Capture'; } catch (error) { console.error('Camera error:', error); alert('❌ Could not access camera. Please check permissions or use "Upload Image" instead.'); } } /** * Take photo from video stream */ function takeFoodPhoto() { const video = document.getElementById('food-camera-video'); const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.width = video.videoWidth; canvas.height = video.videoHeight; canvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(video, 0, 0); // Stop stream if (imageRecognitionStream) { imageRecognitionStream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop()); imageRecognitionStream = null; } // Hide camera, show preview document.getElementById('food-camera-container').style.display = 'none'; // Convert to blob and process canvas.toBlob(blob => { const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); showImagePreview(url); recognizeFood(canvas); }); } /** * Upload photo */ function uploadPhoto() { document.getElementById('food-image-input').click(); } /** * Process uploaded image */ function processUploadedImage() { const input = document.getElementById('food-image-input'); const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; if (!file.type.startsWith('image/')) { alert('Please select an image file'); return; } const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { showImagePreview(e.target.result); // Create image element for recognition const img = new Image(); img.onload = function() { recognizeFood(img); }; img.src = e.target.result; }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } /** * Show image preview */ function showImagePreview(url) { document.getElementById('food-preview-img').src = url; document.getElementById('food-image-preview').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('image-recognition-status').textContent = '🤖 Analyzing image...'; } /** * Recognize food in image using MobileNet */ async function recognizeFood(imageElement) { try { const model = await loadMobileNetModel(); if (!model) { document.getElementById('image-recognition-status').textContent = '❌ Could not load AI model. Please try again.'; return; } // Get predictions const predictions = await model.classify(imageElement); console.log('Predictions:', predictions); // Filter food-related predictions const foodPredictions = predictions.filter(p => p.probability > 0.1); if (foodPredictions.length === 0) { document.getElementById('image-recognition-status').textContent = '❌ Could not identify food. Try a clearer photo or different angle.'; return; } // Display results displayFoodPredictions(foodPredictions); } catch (error) { console.error('Recognition error:', error); document.getElementById('image-recognition-status').textContent = '❌ Error analyzing image. Please try again.'; } } /** * Display food predictions */ function displayFoodPredictions(predictions) { document.getElementById('food-recognition-results').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('image-recognition-status').style.display = 'none'; let html = ''; predictions.forEach((pred, index) => { const confidence = Math.round(pred.probability * 100); const foodName = pred.className; // Estimate nutrition (very rough estimates - in production, use a proper API) const estimatedNutrition = estimateNutritionFromFood(foodName); html += `
${index === 0 ? '🎯 ' : ''}${foodName}
${confidence}% confident
Est: ${estimatedNutrition.calories} cal • ${estimatedNutrition.protein}g protein
👆 Tap to add to diary
`; }); document.getElementById('food-predictions-list').innerHTML = html; } /** * Estimate nutrition from food name (rough estimates) */ function estimateNutritionFromFood(foodName) { const name = foodName.toLowerCase(); // Very rough estimates based on common foods // In production, use a proper nutrition API const estimates = { pizza: { calories: 285, protein: 12, carbs: 36, fat: 10 }, burger: { calories: 295, protein: 17, carbs: 28, fat: 12 }, sandwich: { calories: 250, protein: 15, carbs: 30, fat: 8 }, salad: { calories: 150, protein: 8, carbs: 15, fat: 8 }, pasta: { calories: 220, protein: 8, carbs: 43, fat: 1.3 }, rice: { calories: 206, protein: 4.3, carbs: 45, fat: 0.4 }, chicken: { calories: 239, protein: 27, carbs: 0, fat: 14 }, fish: { calories: 206, protein: 22, carbs: 0, fat: 12 }, steak: { calories: 271, protein: 25, carbs: 0, fat: 19 }, egg: { calories: 155, protein: 13, carbs: 1.1, fat: 11 }, bread: { calories: 265, protein: 9, carbs: 49, fat: 3.2 }, apple: { calories: 52, protein: 0.3, carbs: 14, fat: 0.2 }, banana: { calories: 89, protein: 1.1, carbs: 23, fat: 0.3 } }; for (const [key, nutrition] of Object.entries(estimates)) { if (name.includes(key)) { return nutrition; } } // Default estimate return { calories: 200, protein: 10, carbs: 25, fat: 8 }; } /** * Add recognized food to diary */ function addRecognizedFood(foodName, calories, protein, carbs, fat) { // Create food entry const foodId = 'ai_' + Date.now(); foodDatabase[foodId] = { name: foodName + ' (AI Recognized)', category: 'AI Recognized', servings: [{ name: '1 serving (estimated)', protein: protein, carbs: carbs, fat: fat }] }; // Add to current meal closeImageRecognition(); addFoodToMealDirect(currentScanMeal, foodId, 0, 1); alert(`✅ ${foodName} added!\n\n⚠️ Nutrition values are estimates. Adjust serving size as needed.`); } console.log('🎉🎉🎉 ALL 14 ULTIMATE FEATURES LOADED! 🎉🎉🎉'); console.log('✅ Feature 1: Snack Rotation'); console.log('✅ Feature 2: Recipe Ratings'); console.log('✅ Feature 3: Macro Tolerance'); console.log('✅ Feature 4: Meal Prep Schedule'); console.log('✅ Feature 5: Meal History'); console.log('✅ Feature 6: Nutrition Labels'); console.log('✅ Feature 7: Recipe Photos'); console.log('✅ Feature 8: Alternative Ingredients'); console.log('✅ Feature 9: AI Suggestions'); console.log('✅ Feature 10: Grocery Delivery'); console.log('✅ Feature 11: Family Mode'); console.log('✅ Feature 12: PWA Support'); console.log('✅ Feature 13: Barcode Scanner 📷'); console.log('✅ Feature 14: Food Image Recognition 🤖'); console.log(''); console.log('🏆 MYFITNESSPAL PREMIUM PARITY ACHIEVED + MORE!'); /** * WEEKLY PLAN MODAL */ function openWeeklyPlanModal(targetDay) { if (!profile || !profile.weekPlan) { alert('No weekly plan available'); return; } // Default target = today (1=Mon ... 7=Sun in our weekPlan numbering). // JS Date.getDay() returns 0=Sun ... 6=Sat, so we remap. if (typeof targetDay !== 'number') { const jsDay = new Date().getDay(); // 0=Sun targetDay = jsDay === 0 ? 7 : jsDay; // 1=Mon...7=Sun } const modalHTML = `

🗓️ Your Weekly Meal Plan

Weekly Cost: $${profile.weeklyBudget.toFixed(2)} | Target: ${profile.targetCalories} cal | ${profile.protein}p / ${profile.carbs}c / ${profile.fat}f per day

${(() => { // Calculate average weekly calories const avgCalories = Math.round(profile.weekPlan.reduce((sum, day) => sum + day.actualMacros.calories, 0) / 7); const weeklyDeficit = (profile.targetCalories - avgCalories) * 7; // Calculate time to goal (if weight loss/gain goal exists) if (profile.goal && profile.weight && profile.goalWeight) { const weightDiff = profile.goalWeight - profile.weight; const isLoss = weightDiff < 0; const poundsToGo = Math.abs(weightDiff); // 3500 calories = 1 pound const weeksToGoal = Math.abs(weeklyDeficit) > 0 ? Math.ceil((poundsToGo * 3500) / Math.abs(weeklyDeficit)) : null; if (weeksToGoal && weeksToGoal > 0 && weeksToGoal < 200) { const days = weeksToGoal * 7; const months = Math.floor(weeksToGoal / 4.3); let timeDisplay; if (weeksToGoal < 4) { timeDisplay = `${weeksToGoal} week${weeksToGoal !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`; } else if (months < 12) { timeDisplay = `${months} month${months !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`; } else { const years = Math.floor(months / 12); timeDisplay = `${years} year${years !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`; } const deficitText = weeklyDeficit > 0 ? `+${Math.abs(weeklyDeficit)}` : `${weeklyDeficit}`; return `

📊 Avg: ${avgCalories} cal/day (${deficitText} cal/week) • 🎯 Est. ${Math.abs(poundsToGo).toFixed(1)} lbs to goal in ~${timeDisplay}

`; } } // Fallback if no goal weight set const deficitText = weeklyDeficit > 0 ? `+${Math.abs(weeklyDeficit)}` : `${weeklyDeficit}`; return `

📊 Weekly Average: ${avgCalories} cal/day (${deficitText} cal/week vs target)

`; })()}
${profile.weekPlan.map(day => `
${day.dayName}
${day.actualMacros.calories} cal | ${day.actualMacros.protein}p | ${day.actualMacros.carbs}c | ${day.actualMacros.fat}f
▼
🍳 ${day.breakfast.meal.name || day.breakfast.meal.key}
${Math.round((day.breakfast.macros.protein * 4) + (day.breakfast.macros.carbs * 4) + (day.breakfast.macros.fat * 9))} cal | ${day.breakfast.macros.protein}p / ${day.breakfast.macros.carbs}c / ${day.breakfast.macros.fat}f
🥗 ${day.lunch.meal.name || day.lunch.meal.key}
${Math.round((day.lunch.macros.protein * 4) + (day.lunch.macros.carbs * 4) + (day.lunch.macros.fat * 9))} cal | ${day.lunch.macros.protein}p / ${day.lunch.macros.carbs}c / ${day.lunch.macros.fat}f
🍽️ ${day.dinner.meal.name || day.dinner.meal.key}
${Math.round((day.dinner.macros.protein * 4) + (day.dinner.macros.carbs * 4) + (day.dinner.macros.fat * 9))} cal | ${day.dinner.macros.protein}p / ${day.dinner.macros.carbs}c / ${day.dinner.macros.fat}f
🥤 ${day.snack.meal.name}
${Math.round((day.snack.meal.protein * 4) + (day.snack.meal.carbs * 4) + (day.snack.meal.fat * 9))} cal | ${day.snack.meal.protein}p / ${day.snack.meal.carbs}c / ${day.snack.meal.fat}f
Total: ${day.actualMacros.calories} cal | ${day.actualMacros.protein}p | ${day.actualMacros.carbs}c | ${day.actualMacros.fat}f
$${day.totalCost.toFixed(2)}
${(() => { const calDiff = day.actualMacros.calories - profile.targetCalories; const proteinDiff = day.actualMacros.protein - profile.protein; const carbsDiff = day.actualMacros.carbs - profile.carbs; const fatDiff = day.actualMacros.fat - profile.fat; const formatDiff = (value, unit) => { if (value > 0) return `+${value}${unit}`; if (value < 0) return `${value}${unit}`; return `±0${unit}`; }; return `
vs Target: ${formatDiff(calDiff, ' cal')} | ${formatDiff(proteinDiff, 'p')} | ${formatDiff(carbsDiff, 'c')} | ${formatDiff(fatDiff, 'f')}
`; })()}
`).join('')}
`; // Remove existing modal if any const existingModal = document.getElementById('weeklyPlanModal'); if (existingModal) existingModal.remove(); // Add new modal document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', modalHTML); // Auto-expand and scroll to the target day (today by default). // The setTimeout lets the DOM finish laying out before we measure scrollTop. setTimeout(() => { toggleModalDay(targetDay); const dayEl = document.getElementById('modal-day-' + targetDay); if (dayEl && typeof dayEl.scrollIntoView === 'function') { dayEl.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); } }, 100); } function closeWeeklyPlanModal() { const modal = document.getElementById('weeklyPlanModal'); if (modal) modal.remove(); modalExpandedDay = null; } let modalExpandedDay = null; function toggleModalDay(dayNumber) { const header = document.querySelector(`#modal-day-${dayNumber} .day-header`); const content = document.getElementById(`modal-content-${dayNumber}`); const chevron = document.querySelector(`#modal-day-${dayNumber} .day-chevron`); // If clicking already expanded day, collapse it if (modalExpandedDay === dayNumber) { header.style.background = '#f8f9fa'; header.style.color = '#333'; content.style.display = 'none'; chevron.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; modalExpandedDay = null; return; } // Collapse previously expanded day if (modalExpandedDay) { const prevHeader = document.querySelector(`#modal-day-${modalExpandedDay} .day-header`); const prevContent = document.getElementById(`modal-content-${modalExpandedDay}`); const prevChevron = document.querySelector(`#modal-day-${modalExpandedDay} .day-chevron`); if (prevHeader) { prevHeader.style.background = '#f8f9fa'; prevHeader.style.color = '#333'; } if (prevContent) prevContent.style.display = 'none'; if (prevChevron) prevChevron.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } // Expand clicked day header.style.background = '#0a7d5a'; header.style.color = 'white'; content.style.display = 'block'; chevron.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; // Update text colors for expanded state const dayTitle = header.querySelector('div > div:first-child'); const dayStats = header.querySelector('div > div:last-child'); if (dayTitle) dayTitle.style.color = 'white'; if (dayStats) dayStats.style.color = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)'; modalExpandedDay = dayNumber; } /** * MEAL SWAPPING SYSTEM */ let currentSwapContext = null; let expandedDay = null; // Track which day is expanded /** * Switch between result tabs */ function switchResultTab(tabName) { console.log('Switching to tab:', tabName); // Update tab buttons document.querySelectorAll('.result-tab').forEach(tab => { tab.classList.remove('active'); }); // Add active to clicked tab based on tabName const tabButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.result-tab'); if (tabName === 'overview' && tabButtons[0]) tabButtons[0].classList.add('active'); if (tabName === 'weekly' && tabButtons[1]) tabButtons[1].classList.add('active'); if (tabName === 'shopping' && tabButtons[2]) tabButtons[2].classList.add('active'); // Update tab content document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(content => { content.classList.remove('active'); }); const targetTab = document.getElementById(`tab-${tabName}`); if (targetTab) { targetTab.classList.add('active'); console.log('Activated tab:', tabName); } else { console.error('Tab not found:', `tab-${tabName}`); } } /** * Toggle day accordion */ function toggleDay(dayNumber) { const header = document.querySelector(`#day-${dayNumber} .day-header`); const content = document.getElementById(`content-${dayNumber}`); // If clicking already expanded day, collapse it if (expandedDay === dayNumber) { header.classList.remove('expanded'); content.classList.remove('expanded'); expandedDay = null; return; } // Collapse previously expanded day if (expandedDay) { const prevHeader = document.querySelector(`#day-${expandedDay} .day-header`); const prevContent = document.getElementById(`content-${expandedDay}`); if (prevHeader) prevHeader.classList.remove('expanded'); if (prevContent) prevContent.classList.remove('expanded'); } // Expand clicked day header.classList.add('expanded'); content.classList.add('expanded'); expandedDay = dayNumber; } function swapMeal(dayNumber, mealType, source) { // v1.6.2: direct, selectable swap sheet. This restores user choice without // turning Swap into a blind one-option cycle. if (!profile || !profile.weekPlan) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('No meal plan available'); else alert('No meal plan available'); return; } const day = profile.weekPlan.find(d => d.day == dayNumber) || profile.weekPlan[dayNumber - 1]; if (!day || !day[mealType]) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Day not found'); else alert('Day not found'); return; } const alternatives = getAlternativeMeals(mealType, profile.cuisinePreferences || []); const current = day[mealType] && day[mealType].meal ? day[mealType].meal : {}; const currentKey = current.key || current.id || ''; const currentName = current.name || ''; const usable = alternatives.filter(m => m && (m.key !== currentKey) && ((m.name || '') !== currentName)); if (!usable.length) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('No swap options available'); return; } currentSwapContext = { dayNumber, mealType, day, source: source || (document.getElementById('weeklyPlanModal') ? 'weekly' : 'home') }; showSwapModal(day, mealType, usable); } function getAlternativeMeals(mealType, cuisinePreferences) { let meals = []; if (mealType === 'breakfast') { meals = Object.entries(breakfastRecipes).map(([key, meal]) => ({ key, ...meal, type: 'breakfast' })); } else if (mealType === 'lunch') { meals = Object.entries(lunchRecipes).map(([key, meal]) => ({ key, ...meal, type: 'lunch' })); } else if (mealType === 'dinner') { meals = Object.entries(recipes) .filter(([key, meal]) => cuisinePreferences.includes(meal.cuisine)) .map(([key, meal]) => ({ key, ...meal, type: 'dinner' })); } else if (mealType === 'snack') { meals = Object.entries(snackOptions).map(([key, meal]) => ({ key, ...meal, type: 'snack' })); } // Limit to 10 alternatives for UI return meals.slice(0, 10); } function showSwapModal(day, mealType, alternatives) { const currentMeal = day[mealType]; const mealLabel = mealType.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + mealType.slice(1); const modalHTML = `

Swap ${mealLabel}

Current
${currentMeal.meal.name || currentMeal.meal.key}
${currentMeal.macros.protein}p · ${currentMeal.macros.carbs}c · ${currentMeal.macros.fat}f · $${currentMeal.cost.toFixed(2)}
Choose alternative
${alternatives.map(meal => `
${meal.name || meal.key}
${meal.description ? `
${meal.emoji || ''} ${meal.description}
` : ''} ${meal.protein !== undefined ? `
${meal.protein}p · ${meal.carbs}c · ${meal.fat}f${meal.cost ? ` · $${meal.cost.toFixed(2)}` : ''}
` : `
Portions adjusted to your macro targets
`}
`).join('')}
`; // Remove existing modal if any const existingModal = document.getElementById('swapModal'); if (existingModal) existingModal.remove(); // Add new modal document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', modalHTML); // Add hover effects using CSS variables — works in both light and dark mode setTimeout(() => { document.querySelectorAll('.alternative-meal').forEach(el => { el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { el.style.borderColor = 'var(--accent-primary)'; el.style.background = 'var(--accent-soft)'; }); el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { el.style.borderColor = 'var(--border-subtle)'; el.style.background = 'var(--bg-card)'; }); }); }, 100); } function confirmSwap(newMealKey) { if (!currentSwapContext) return; const { dayNumber, mealType, day } = currentSwapContext; // Get new meal data let newMeal; if (mealType === 'breakfast') { newMeal = breakfastRecipes[newMealKey]; } else if (mealType === 'lunch') { newMeal = lunchRecipes[newMealKey]; } else if (mealType === 'dinner') { newMeal = recipes[newMealKey]; } else if (mealType === 'snack') { newMeal = snackOptions[newMealKey]; } if (!newMeal) { alert('Meal not found'); return; } // Update the meal in the day plan day[mealType].meal = { key: newMealKey, ...newMeal }; // Recalculate macros and cost if (mealType === 'snack') { // Snacks have fixed macros day[mealType].macros = { protein: newMeal.protein, carbs: newMeal.carbs, fat: newMeal.fat, calories: (newMeal.protein * 4) + (newMeal.carbs * 4) + (newMeal.fat * 9) }; day[mealType].cost = newMeal.cost; } else { // For breakfast/lunch/dinner, calculate macros from the new meal const newMealMacros = calculateMealMacros(newMeal, mealType); day[mealType].macros = newMealMacros; day[mealType].cost = estimateMealCost(newMeal, mealType); } // Recalculate day totals day.actualMacros = { protein: day.breakfast.macros.protein + day.lunch.macros.protein + day.dinner.macros.protein + (day.snack.macros.protein || 0), carbs: day.breakfast.macros.carbs + day.lunch.macros.carbs + day.dinner.macros.carbs + (day.snack.macros.carbs || 0), fat: day.breakfast.macros.fat + day.lunch.macros.fat + day.dinner.macros.fat + (day.snack.macros.fat || 0), calories: day.breakfast.macros.calories + day.lunch.macros.calories + day.dinner.macros.calories + (day.snack.macros.calories || 0) }; day.totalCost = day.breakfast.cost + day.lunch.cost + day.dinner.cost + day.snack.cost; // Invalidate shopping list cache - swap changed ingredients, // so shopping tab + store comparison must regenerate from the new plan. // Custom store prices survive (keyed by dbKey), only the item list refreshes. state.dynamicShoppingList = null; if (typeof saveState === 'function') saveState(); // Save updated profile localStorage.setItem('user-profile', JSON.stringify(profile)); // Capture source before clearing context, then close any picker if present. const source = (currentSwapContext && currentSwapContext.source) || 'weekly'; closeSwapModal(); // Refresh home page with updated meal (always — keeps home in sync) if (typeof updateMainPagePlanner === 'function') { updateMainPagePlanner(); } if (source === 'weekly') { // User came from the Weekly Plan modal — reopen it expanded to the swapped day. // The user expects to verify their swap landed correctly in context. if (typeof closeWeeklyPlanModal === 'function') closeWeeklyPlanModal(); setTimeout(() => { openWeeklyPlanModal(dayNumber); // openWeeklyPlanModal already auto-expands its targetDay arg, so we don't // need a second toggleModalDay call here. }, 100); } else { // User came from the home page — they're back on home with a refreshed plan. // Don't pop a modal they didn't ask for. A toast confirms the action. if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') { const newName = (newMeal && newMeal.name) || 'meal'; showLogToast('Swapped to ' + newName); } } } function closeSwapModal() { const modal = document.getElementById('swapModal'); if (modal) modal.remove(); currentSwapContext = null; } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // VIEW RECIPE INLINE (in weekly planner) // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ─── Standalone Recipe Modal ────────────────────────────────────── // Triggered when a user taps a meal card on the home page Today view. // Drills directly to recipe detail (industry pattern) instead of routing // to the full weekly plan list. Does not depend on the weekly modal // being open — renders its own self-contained modal with ingredients, // macros, and shortcut buttons to swap meal or open the full week view. // v1.5.1 Issue #2: Meal timing rationale — used inside the recipe detail // modal's "Why this meal time?" expandable. // // v1.5.3 Issue #3: Times now derive from the user's actual wake/bed times // (state.routine), not hardcoded values. Falls back to 07:00/22:30 if // state.routine isn't set yet. Pattern C delays scale relative to wake // time so cortisol-aware programming follows the user's actual schedule. // // Time windows: // breakfast standard → wake+60 to wake+90 min // breakfast Pattern C → wake+150 to wake+180 min (delayed for cortisol taper) // lunch → wake+5 to wake+6.5 hr (standard) / wake+6 to wake+7.5 (C) // dinner → bed-4 to bed-2.5 hr (3+ hr before bed) // dinner Pattern C → bed-5 to bed-4 hr (earlier; protect overnight HRV) // snack → mid-afternoon, ~midpoint between lunch and dinner function getMealTimingRationale(mealType, userProfile) { const isPatternC = userProfile && userProfile.pattern === 'C'; // Defensive read of routine times. state.routine may not exist yet for // brand-new profiles; wakeTime/bedtime fall back to sensible defaults. const routine = (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state && state.routine) ? state.routine : {}; const wake = (typeof routine.wakeTime === 'string' && /^\d{1,2}:\d{2}$/.test(routine.wakeTime)) ? routine.wakeTime : '07:00'; const bed = (typeof routine.bedtime === 'string' && /^\d{1,2}:\d{2}$/.test(routine.bedtime)) ? routine.bedtime : '22:30'; // Helpers — use existing minutesFrom + formatTime12 for date math + display. const t = (anchor, deltaMin) => (typeof formatTime12 === 'function' && typeof minutesFrom === 'function') ? formatTime12(minutesFrom(anchor, deltaMin)) : ''; const range = (anchor, fromMin, toMin) => `${t(anchor, fromMin)}–${t(anchor, toMin)}`; // Build dynamic windows. const breakfastWindow = isPatternC ? range(wake, 150, 180) // wake + 2.5 to 3 hr : range(wake, 60, 90); // wake + 1 to 1.5 hr const lunchWindow = isPatternC ? range(wake, 360, 450) // wake + 6 to 7.5 hr : range(wake, 300, 390); // wake + 5 to 6.5 hr const dinnerWindow = isPatternC ? range(bed, -300, -240) // bed - 5 to -4 hr (note: minutesFrom handles negatives) : range(bed, -240, -150); // bed - 4 to -2.5 hr const snackTime = isPatternC ? t(wake, 540) // wake + 9 hr : t(wake, 480); // wake + 8 hr const map = { breakfast: isPatternC ? `Recommended: ${breakfastWindow}

Pattern C: delay breakfast to mid-morning, around 2.5–3 hours after waking. Morning cortisol is naturally elevated — eating later lets it taper before food spikes insulin, which protects energy through the day.

Based on your wake time of ${formatTime12(wake)}.` : `Recommended: ${breakfastWindow} (within 60–90 min of waking)

Front-loads protein when insulin sensitivity is highest, sets satiety for the day, and pairs well with morning sun for circadian alignment.

Based on your wake time of ${formatTime12(wake)}.`, lunch: isPatternC ? `Recommended: ${lunchWindow} — your largest meal

Pattern C: cortisol has dropped, insulin sensitivity is good, and a substantial midday meal supports stable afternoon energy without the post-meal crash.` : `Recommended: ${lunchWindow} (5–6.5 hr after breakfast)

Mid-day is when most people have the strongest digestion and the lowest stress impact on a larger meal.`, dinner: isPatternC ? `Recommended: ${dinnerWindow} — finish well before bed, smaller portion

Pattern C: late carbs spike insulin near bedtime, which suppresses overnight HRV recovery — the opposite of what you need.

Based on your bedtime of ${formatTime12(bed)}.` : `Recommended: ${dinnerWindow} (2.5–4 hr before bed)

Earlier dinners support deeper sleep and better overnight recovery. Heavier meals close to sleep reduce sleep quality measurably.

Based on your bedtime of ${formatTime12(bed)}.`, snack: `Recommended: around ${snackTime} or post-workout

Bridges the gap between meals when hunger threatens diet adherence — much better than ignoring it and overshooting at dinner.` }; return map[mealType] || 'Time meals to your training and sleep schedule. Consistency matters more than precision.'; } function openRecipeFromHome(mealType, dayIdx) { if (!profile || !profile.weekPlan) return; // Convert array index (0-6) to weekPlan day number (1-7) const dayNumber = (typeof dayIdx === 'number') ? dayIdx + 1 : dayIdx; const day = profile.weekPlan.find(d => d.day === dayNumber) || profile.weekPlan[dayIdx]; if (!day) return; const slot = day[mealType]; if (!slot || !slot.meal) return; const meal = slot.meal; const macros = slot.macros || {}; const ingredients = (typeof meal.getIngredients === 'function') ? meal.getIngredients(macros) : []; const calculatedCal = Math.round((macros.protein || 0) * 4 + (macros.carbs || 0) * 4 + (macros.fat || 0) * 9); // Day name for header const dayNames = ['Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday','Sunday']; const dayName = dayNames[dayNumber - 1] || ('Day ' + dayNumber); const slotEmojis = { breakfast: '🥐', lunch: '🥗', dinner: '🍽️', snack: '🍿' }; const slotEmoji = slotEmojis[mealType] || '🍽️'; // Remove any prior instance const existing = document.getElementById('homeRecipeModal'); if (existing) existing.remove(); const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'homeRecipeModal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:10000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;'; modal.innerHTML = `
${dayName} · ${mealType}

${slotEmoji} ${meal.name || mealType}

${meal.description ? `

${meal.description}

` : ''}
${calculatedCal} cal P ${macros.protein || 0}g C ${macros.carbs || 0}g F ${macros.fat || 0}g ${meal.cuisine ? `${meal.cuisine}` : ''} ${meal.prepTime ? `⏱ ${meal.prepTime}` : ''}
Ingredients
${ingredients.length > 0 ? `
    ${ingredients.map(ing => `
  • ${ing}
    • `).join('')}
` : `
No ingredient list available for this meal.
`}
${meal.instructions ? `
Instructions
${meal.instructions}
` : ''}
${getMealTimingRationale(mealType, profile)}
`; // Click outside to dismiss modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); }); document.body.appendChild(modal); } // ─── Lunch instructions fallback ─────────────────────────────────── // Lunch recipes in the recipe DB were defined without instructions arrays // (only ingredients). Rather than write 35+ individual instruction sets, // generate sensible step-by-step guidance from the meal type pattern. // The match is based on recipe ID/name keywords; falls back to a generic // "assemble + plate" template for anything not matched. function inferLunchInstructions(meal) { if (!meal || !meal.name) return []; const name = (meal.name || '').toLowerCase(); // Wraps & sandwiches if (name.includes('wrap') || name.includes('sandwich') || name.includes('burrito')) { return [ 'Cook protein if raw (chicken, turkey, etc.) — pan-sear over medium-high until cooked through, 6–8 min. Let rest 2 min, then slice.', 'Warm wrap or toast bread lightly to make it pliable and prevent sogginess.', 'Spread sauce or condiment evenly on the inside surface.', 'Layer protein, then greens, then any veggies, leaving a 1-inch border.', 'Roll tightly (wraps) or close (sandwich); slice in half for easier eating.' ]; } // Bowls & power plates if (name.includes('bowl') || name.includes('plate') || name.includes('power')) { return [ 'Cook the base grain (rice, quinoa, etc.) according to package directions if not already prepared.', 'Cook protein: pan-sear, grill, or use pre-cooked. Season simply with salt, pepper, and any cuisine-appropriate spices.', 'Prep veggies: chop, slice, or roast as needed. Roasted veggies (425°F for 20 min) develop the most flavor.', 'Build the bowl: grain on the bottom, protein and veggies arranged on top.', 'Drizzle with sauce or dressing just before eating.' ]; } // Salads if (name.includes('salad')) { return [ 'Cook protein if needed (grill chicken 6 min/side, sear salmon 4 min/side, or use pre-cooked).', 'Wash and dry greens thoroughly — wet greens dilute dressing.', 'Chop any vegetables and protein into bite-sized pieces.', 'In a large bowl, toss greens with about 2/3 of the dressing.', 'Top with protein, vegetables, and any garnishes; drizzle remaining dressing on top.' ]; } // Soups if (name.includes('soup') || name.includes('chili') || name.includes('stew')) { return [ 'Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat. Sauté any aromatics (onion, garlic) 2–3 min until fragrant.', 'Add protein and brown lightly, 3–4 min.', 'Pour in broth and any canned tomatoes, beans, or vegetables.', 'Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer 15–20 min until flavors meld.', 'Season to taste with salt, pepper, and herbs. Serve hot.' ]; } // Stir-fry / Asian dishes if (name.includes('stir') || name.includes('teriyaki') || name.includes('asian') || name.includes('thai')) { return [ 'Prep all ingredients first — stir-frying is fast and you won\'t have time mid-cook.', 'Heat 1 tbsp oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat until shimmering.', 'Add protein, spread in single layer; cook undisturbed 2 min, then stir-fry until cooked, 3–4 min more.', 'Add vegetables (firmer ones first), stir-fry 3–4 min until just tender.', 'Add sauce, toss to coat, cook 1 min more. Serve immediately over rice or noodles.' ]; } // Pasta if (name.includes('pasta') || name.includes('spaghetti') || name.includes('lasagna')) { return [ 'Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook pasta to al dente per package directions.', 'While pasta cooks: heat oil in a pan, cook protein until done, then set aside.', 'In the same pan, build sauce: sauté garlic 30 sec, add tomatoes/sauce, simmer 5 min.', 'Drain pasta (reserve 1/4 cup pasta water). Add pasta and protein to sauce, toss to coat.', 'Add a splash of pasta water if needed. Serve with cheese or fresh herbs.' ]; } // Tacos & Mexican if (name.includes('taco') || name.includes('quesadilla') || name.includes('fajita')) { return [ 'Cook protein: season with cumin, chili powder, and salt; pan-sear or grill until cooked through.', 'Warm tortillas in a dry skillet 30 sec per side, or wrap in foil and warm in oven.', 'Prep toppings: dice tomato, onion, avocado; shred cheese; chop cilantro.', 'Assemble: layer protein, then toppings, finishing with sauce/salsa.', 'Serve immediately with lime wedges.' ]; } // Generic fallback for anything else return [ 'Cook any raw protein over medium-high heat until done (chicken/turkey: 6–8 min, fish: 4 min/side).', 'Prep all other components: wash greens, chop vegetables, measure portions per the ingredients list.', 'If the dish has a sauce or dressing, prepare it now so flavors can meld.', 'Combine all components on the plate or in a bowl, adding sauce/dressing last.', 'Season to taste with salt and pepper. Serve immediately.' ]; } function viewRecipe(mealType, dayNumber) { if (!profile || !profile.weekPlan) return; const day = profile.weekPlan.find(d => d.day === dayNumber); if (!day) return; const meal = day[mealType].meal; const macros = day[mealType].macros; const recipeContainer = document.getElementById(`recipe-${mealType}-${dayNumber}`); if (!recipeContainer) return; // Toggle visibility if (recipeContainer.style.display === 'block') { recipeContainer.style.display = 'none'; return; } // Get ingredients const ingredients = meal.getIngredients ? meal.getIngredients(macros) : []; // Get instructions — use stored if present, else infer from meal name/type. // Lunch recipes were defined without instructions originally; this fallback // ensures every recipe has guidance without requiring 35+ manual additions. const instructions = (meal.instructions && meal.instructions.length > 0) ? meal.instructions : (typeof inferLunchInstructions === 'function' ? inferLunchInstructions(meal) : []); // Build recipe HTML (existing inline modal-recipe code continues below) let html = `

${meal.emoji || '🍽️'} ${meal.name}

${meal.cuisine ? `${meal.cuisine}` : ''} ${meal.prepTime ? `⏱ ${meal.prepTime}` : ''} ${meal.difficulty ? `${meal.difficulty}` : ''}
${meal.description ? `

${meal.description}

` : ''}
Ingredients
${ingredients.length > 0 ? `
