    ${ingredients.map(ing => `
  • ${ing}
    • `).join('')}
` : '

No ingredients listed

'}
${instructions && instructions.length > 0 ? `
Instructions
    ${instructions.map(step => `
  1. ${step}
    2. `).join('')}
` : ''}
${Math.round(macros.calories)} cal  ·  ${Math.round(macros.protein)}p · ${Math.round(macros.carbs)}c · ${Math.round(macros.fat)}f
`; recipeContainer.innerHTML = html; recipeContainer.style.display = 'block'; // Scroll to the recipe recipeContainer.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' }); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // POPULATE WATER TAB (HYDRATION SCHEDULE) // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderHydrationSchedule() { if (typeof ensureHydrationToday === 'function') ensureHydrationToday(); if (!profile || !profile.waterOz) { console.log('⚠️ No profile or waterOz for hydration schedule'); return; } const container = document.getElementById('hydration-items'); const goalText = document.getElementById('water-goal-text'); if (!container) { console.log('⚠️ hydration-items element not found'); return; } // Update goal text only if it's still the placeholder (don't overwrite custom labels). // The Diary water card sets its own header to "💧 Hydration" — leave that alone. if (goalText && goalText.textContent === '💧 Daily Goal') { goalText.textContent = `💧 ${profile.waterOz}oz Daily Goal`; } // Use the canonical hydration schedule so the visible UI agrees with // the home-screen daily total (single source of truth). const schedule = getHydrationSchedule(); let html = ''; schedule.forEach(checkpoint => { html += ` `; }); container.innerHTML = html; // Load saved state if exists if (state && state.hydration) { schedule.forEach(checkpoint => { const checkbox = document.getElementById(checkpoint.id); if (checkbox && state.hydration[checkpoint.id]) { checkbox.checked = true; } }); updateHydrationProgress(); } console.log(`✅ Rendered hydration schedule with ${schedule.length} checkpoints`); } function toggleHydration(checkpointId) { if (typeof ensureHydrationToday === 'function') ensureHydrationToday(); if (!state.hydration) state.hydration = {}; const checkbox = document.getElementById(checkpointId); if (checkbox) { state.hydration[checkpointId] = checkbox.checked; const count = ['h1','h2','h3','h4','h5','h6','h7','h8'].filter(id => state.hydration[id]).length; if (!state.hydrationByDate) state.hydrationByDate = {}; state.hydrationByDate[(typeof todayISO === 'function') ? todayISO() : new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)] = count; saveState(); updateHydrationProgress(); } } // ─── Quick Glass Logging ────────────────────────────────────────── // Aligns with how users actually drink water: "I just drank some, log it." // Checks the next unchecked checkpoint in order (so the schedule fills // progressively and the existing UI updates naturally). function logOneGlass() { const now = Date.now(); if (window.__sorrelWaterClickGuard && (now - window.__sorrelWaterClickGuard) < 900) return; window.__sorrelWaterClickGuard = now; if (typeof ensureHydrationToday === 'function') ensureHydrationToday(); if (!state.hydrationByDate) state.hydrationByDate = {}; const day = (typeof todayISO === 'function') ? todayISO() : new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); const current = Math.max(0, Math.min(8, Number(state.hydrationByDate[day] || 0))); if (current >= 8) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('All glasses logged for today!'); return; } state.hydrationByDate[day] = current + 1; state.hydration = {}; ['h1','h2','h3','h4','h5','h6','h7','h8'].forEach((id, idx) => { state.hydration[id] = idx < state.hydrationByDate[day]; const cb = document.getElementById(id); if (cb) cb.checked = state.hydration[id]; }); saveState(); updateHydrationProgress(); if (typeof renderPlanNextSteps === 'function') { try { renderPlanNextSteps(); } catch(e) {} } if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') { const ozPerCheckpoint = Math.round(((profile && profile.waterOz) ? profile.waterOz : 96) / 8); showLogToast('+' + ozPerCheckpoint + 'oz logged · ' + state.hydrationByDate[day] + '/8 today'); } } function undoLastGlass() { if (typeof ensureHydrationToday === 'function') ensureHydrationToday(); if (!state.hydrationByDate) state.hydrationByDate = {}; const day = (typeof todayISO === 'function') ? todayISO() : new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); const current = Math.max(0, Math.min(8, Number(state.hydrationByDate[day] || 0))); if (current <= 0) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Nothing to undo'); return; } state.hydrationByDate[day] = current - 1; state.hydration = {}; ['h1','h2','h3','h4','h5','h6','h7','h8'].forEach((id, idx) => { state.hydration[id] = idx < state.hydrationByDate[day]; const cb = document.getElementById(id); if (cb) cb.checked = state.hydration[id]; }); saveState(); updateHydrationProgress(); if (typeof renderHydrationSchedule === 'function') renderHydrationSchedule(); if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Removed last glass'); } // v1.5.1 Issue #9: Hard reset to 0oz. Confirms first because users won't // expect a single tap to wipe a full day's hydration logging. function resetWaterToday() { if (typeof ensureHydrationToday === 'function') ensureHydrationToday(); if (!state.hydrationByDate) state.hydrationByDate = {}; const day = (typeof todayISO === 'function') ? todayISO() : new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); const completed = Math.max(0, Math.min(8, Number(state.hydrationByDate[day] || 0))); if (completed === 0) { if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('No water logged yet today'); return; } if (!confirm(`Reset today's water log? (${completed} glass${completed === 1 ? '' : 'es'} will be cleared.)`)) return; state.hydrationByDate[day] = 0; state.hydration = { h1:false,h2:false,h3:false,h4:false,h5:false,h6:false,h7:false,h8:false }; ['h1','h2','h3','h4','h5','h6','h7','h8'].forEach(id => { const cb = document.getElementById(id); if (cb) cb.checked = false; }); saveState(); updateHydrationProgress(); if (typeof renderHydrationSchedule === 'function') renderHydrationSchedule(); if (typeof showLogToast === 'function') showLogToast('Water reset to 0oz'); } function updateHydrationProgress() { if (typeof ensureHydrationToday === 'function') ensureHydrationToday(); if (!profile) return; const day = (typeof todayISO === 'function') ? todayISO() : new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); const total = 8; const completed = Math.max(0, Math.min(8, Number((state.hydrationByDate && state.hydrationByDate[day]) || 0))); const ozPerCheckpoint = Math.round((profile.waterOz || 96) / 8); const totalOz = completed * ozPerCheckpoint; const percentage = Math.round((completed / total) * 100); if (!state.hydration) state.hydration = {}; ['h1','h2','h3','h4','h5','h6','h7','h8'].forEach((id, idx) => { state.hydration[id] = idx < completed; const cb = document.getElementById(id); if (cb) cb.checked = state.hydration[id]; }); const badge = document.getElementById('hydration-badge'); if (badge) { badge.textContent = `${completed}/${total}`; badge.className = completed >= total ? 'badge badge-success' : 'badge badge-warning'; } const waterToday = document.getElementById('water-today'); if (waterToday) waterToday.textContent = `${totalOz}oz`; const progressBar = document.getElementById('hydration-progress'); if (progressBar) { progressBar.style.width = `${percentage}%`; progressBar.style.background = '#0a7d5a'; } }
